I don’t believe in gimmicks or rosy scenarios. Let’s pair this with a substantive deficit reduction package, tight discretionary spending caps, and modest tax increases on high-earners." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 15924, "fields": { "question": 743, "description": "We’re looking at this the wrong way; it’d be lunacy to tighten our belts in the middle of a recession like this. Delay PAYGO and reorient to an expansionary policy, so that we can protect our investments that drive economic growth. Say that the growth, uh, it pays for itself. Say that." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 15926, "fields": { "question": 743, "description": "A tax hike right before the midterm would be a political disaster. Our new plan here is two-fold. Firstly, let’s claw back whatever revenue we can through user fees, administrative adjustments, things of that nature, so that they don’t make ugly headlines. Whatever the shortfall ends up being, let’s ask Congress to hold off until after the elections." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 15930, "fields": { "question": 743, "description": "PAYGO is exactly the type of thing we need to get our fiscal house in order. I don’t believe in gimmicks or rosy scenarios. Let’s pair this with a substantive deficit reduction package, tight discretionary spending caps, and modest tax increases on high-earners." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 15932, "fields": { "question": 743, "description": "We’re looking at this the wrong way; it’d be lunacy to tighten our belts in the middle of a recession like this. Delay PAYGO and reorient to an expansionary policy, so that we can protect our investments that drive economic growth. Say that the growth, uh, it pays for itself. Say that." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 15947, "fields": { "question": 15946, "description": "Energy policy is very important; we’ll enter the new millennium at a comparative disadvantage if we don’t diversify our energy production. Let’s push for a bill on Capitol Hill investing in energy efficiency grants and renewable energy research." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 15949, "fields": { "question": 15946, "description": "I’ve always cared a lot about drunk driving. That’s something very dangerous. It kills people, you know. Let’s sign some executive orders creating an advisory board and push for education funding through Congress, that’s something everyone can get behind." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 15951, "fields": { "question": 15946, "description": "I’ve seen a few of the studies published by Bob Reich about how much we could save in overhead costs if we established a body to coordinate infrastructure across the federal departments and with the states. Let’s sign an EO establishing the National Infrastructure Council." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 15955, "fields": { "question": 15946, "description": "Energy policy is very important; we’ll enter the new millennium at a comparative disadvantage if we don’t diversify our energy production. Let’s push for a bill on Capitol Hill investing in energy efficiency grants and renewable energy research." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 15957, "fields": { "question": 15946, "description": "I’ve seen a few of the studies published by Bob Reich about how much we could save in overhead costs if we established a body to coordinate infrastructure across the federal departments and with the states. Let’s sign an EO establishing the National Infrastructure Council." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16030, "fields": { "question": 16029, "description": "Energy policy is very important; we’ll enter the new millennium at a comparative disadvantage if we don’t diversify our energy production. Let’s push for a major bill on Capitol Hill investing in energy efficiency grants and renewable energy research." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16032, "fields": { "question": 16029, "description": "We haven’t done too much with the National Alliance Against Drugs so far, that’s a campaign promise we can deliver on. Appoint Lloyd Bentsen chairman to knock out the Drug Czar promise too, and give him a broad mandate. Maybe he can make himself useful there." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16036, "fields": { "question": 16029, "description": "Let’s not press our luck. Everyone on the Hill wants to close out the session and get back to their districts, they’d never bite on any of these big proposals, not when it puts their reelection on the line. Let’s try something modest, that’ll help out some of our friends in rural districts." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16038, "fields": { "question": 16029, "description": "Energy policy is very important; we’ll enter the new millennium at a comparative disadvantage if we don’t diversify our energy production. Let’s push for a major bill on Capitol Hill investing in energy efficiency grants and renewable energy research." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16040, "fields": { "question": 16029, "description": "We haven’t done too much with the National Alliance Against Drugs so far, that’s a campaign promise we can deliver on. Appoint Lloyd Bentsen chairman to knock out the Drug Czar promise too, and give him a broad mandate. Maybe he can make himself useful there." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16080, "fields": { "question": 16077, "description": "I hope Congress takes a long, hard look in the mirror after these results. This is what happens when you throw everything into the wind for the sake of obstructing the President; you give yourself nothing to run on. I’m excited to get working again for the American people with the incoming Congress." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16082, "fields": { "question": 16077, "description": "If you pay attention to the historical trend, this is a normal occurrence. You win, you do your thing, and then the pendulum swings the other way. It may have swung a little more than we’d hoped, but we can work with it. I call on the Speaker and Majority Leader to respect the tradition of bipartisanship that has made our government work over the coming Congress." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16084, "fields": { "question": 16077, "description": "This is proof that the public wants governance from the middle. They’re sick of all this tomfoolery, but they also want someone who will protect their Medicare and Medicaid from those Republicans who want to gut them. My message to you is that I have received your message to me." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16092, "fields": { "question": 16078, "description": "Forget the PR stuff. Reach out to Foley and Bonior. Tell them that this is exactly what I warned about. Congress needs to work more smoothly and cut it out with all the obstruction and infighting. Hopefully this can be the jolt they need to get working on some of these critical bills." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16094, "fields": { "question": 16078, "description": "If you pay attention to the historical trend, this is a normal thing that happens to the party in power. You win, you do your thing, and then the pendulum swings the other way. It may have swung a little more than we’d hoped, but we can work with it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16096, "fields": { "question": 16078, "description": "Hindsight is 20/20, but I think we’re going to take a lot of lessons from this, going forward. We made mistakes on the legislative side of things and we’ll do our best to learn from them. I thank Congress for their cooperation and look forward to getting back to work for the American people." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16106, "fields": { "question": 16079, "description": "I’m mighty proud of what we accomplished out there. I want to send my sincerest congratulations to Senate Majority Leader Mitchell and Speaker Tom Foley, and I’m excited to get back to work delivering for the American people." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16108, "fields": { "question": 16079, "description": "I’m really inspired by some of our new upstarts, people like Paul Wellstone and Maxine Waters braving a midterm environment to seize victory. I’m excited to work alongside these new members to accomplish the business of government." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16110, "fields": { "question": 16079, "description": "This is a clear indication of how the country is feeling. They want us to turn from the decline of the past decade to face the future. We have a real mandate to continue our reformist government and change this country." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16119, "fields": { "question": 16118, "description": "I strongly oppose this invasion as a violation of international law, but we’re not going to war over this. We’re not risking American lives. That would tear the party to pieces. Let’s emplace severe sanctions and station peacekeepers in the Saudi oil fields." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16121, "fields": { "question": 16118, "description": "We have to be pragmatic about this. It’s important that we defend Kuwaiti interests, but I really want to avoid putting boots on the ground, especially with Vietnam in the public consciousness. We should send a carrier air group to the Gulf and conduct airstrikes on Iraqi targets in Kuwait." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16123, "fields": { "question": 16118, "description": "This is outrageous and illegal. We should act quickly to halt Iraqi aggression and free the Kuwaiti people." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16128, "fields": { "question": 16127, "description": "I’m not dead yet, at least not as long as I have “The Honorable” in front of my name. The people need to know that. And they also need to know that these are the same old hacks responsible for Iran-Contra and tripling your national debt under the last guy." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16130, "fields": { "question": 16127, "description": "Save for Congress misbehaving, we’ve actually had a pretty effective presidency. Regional development conferences, executive actions, things of that nature. That’s what taking the initiative looks like. That’s what getting results looks like." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16132, "fields": { "question": 16127, "description": "I stand for the same things I’ve always stood for, make no mistake about it. The middle class. Good jobs at good wages. A government that levels with its people. And I will always believe, no matter what the cynics say, that the best America is yet to come." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16134, "fields": { "question": 16127, "description": "Don’t look at anything through rose-tinted glasses. The country is moving rightward, and if we don’t get with the program, we’re getting left behind. I’ve always been a middle-of-the-road guy, I’ve always been a skeptic of the old way of thinking. Emphasize that." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16137, "fields": { "question": 16136, "description": "I’m not dead yet, at least not as long as I have “The Honorable” in front of my name. The people need to know that. And they also need to know that these Republicans are the same old hacks responsible for Iran-Contra and tripling your national debt under the last guy." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16139, "fields": { "question": 16136, "description": "Let’s open with a little story about a President’s midterm defeats. Let’s talk at length about how devastating they are, and how his reelection chances are doomed, before revealing that the President we’re talking about is not me, but Ronald Reagan." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16141, "fields": { "question": 16136, "description": "Don’t lose the forest for the trees. There’s enough ambiguity here that we can sell it as a tactical draw, or even a strategic victory. Control of Congress is what matters, Democrats have it and Republicans don’t. Just talk that up a bunch. We’ll get to the rest later." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16146, "fields": { "question": 16145, "description": "Make sure this bill never comes to a vote. Smother it in committee, table it, do whatever it takes. Christ, the last thing I want to do is split open the gun control debate and pick a fight with the firearms lobby. We only stand to lose supporters from that." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16148, "fields": { "question": 16145, "description": "You know, California passed something like this a year or so ago. Why don’t we figure out how they did that? Pack your bags, we’re going to Sacramento. Also, look into sunsetting provisions, so that we can get it through Congress easier." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16150, "fields": { "question": 16145, "description": "Let’s be realistic about this: the law as written is virtually impassable. It’s so ambiguous, and its main focus is cosmetic, not functional features. See if we can amend it to plug some of these loopholes before it gets to a vote." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16152, "fields": { "question": 16145, "description": "These gun organizations, they use publicity and scaremongering. We can march into their trap, or we can wise up and do the same. Let’s have some of these Stockton survivors speak out, and emphasize this is about stopping criminals and terrorists." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16226, "fields": { "question": 16224, "description": "Let’s have a chat with Bob and make sure this dies on the Senate floor. I’m sure he wants us to owe him something. Slide him a couple judgeships and see what he says." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16228, "fields": { "question": 16224, "description": "We can always talk this out with Newt. If he wants cuts to this, that, and the other, we can make them, but the last thing we need is Fritz’s credibility–my competence–called into question. Not after ‘88." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16230, "fields": { "question": 16224, "description": "Hart has caused enough problems for this party the last few years; I think at this point he owes it to us to go on camera and say there was unequivocally no wrongdoing on Mondale’s part during that campaign. Then we can put this all behind us." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16232, "fields": { "question": 16224, "description": "Does anyone understand what all of this means? Folks gave more than the legal amount to Fritz through delegate committees, which were legally independent, whose money he refused to take, and now he’s getting impeached for it? This is all too clever by half, and I trust voters will see through it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16234, "fields": { "question": 16225, "description": "I stared down John Thompson, I think I can handle this Newt guy. He’s an agitator, and the more oxygen we give him, the more of a hullabaloo he’ll make. We need to keep our eyes on the ball, the business of government." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16236, "fields": { "question": 16225, "description": "I’m not the type of person to engage in this game of political brinkmanship. We’ll work with him when we need to, and put our foot down when the situation requires it. But we should keep tabs on the guy, see what he’s up to. He’s a seedy fellow. Put John on that." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16250, "fields": { "question": 723, "description": "I appreciate the thought. I really do. But I think you do bring a lot to the table. With the, you know, the conservative Democrats, and the South, and Texas. You've done everything I’ve asked of you. I'm not done with you just yet." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16269, "fields": { "question": 16267, "description": "For three years, I’ve watched the Fed choke this recovery to death in the name of fighting phantom inflation. We need a push to get this economy moving again, and Felix Rohatyn is the guy to do it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16273, "fields": { "question": 16267, "description": "This is exactly the type of unstable move that would rock the boat right before the campaign. Business can’t get enough of Greenspan, and I really want to avoid sparking a confidence crisis in investors this close to the election." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16275, "fields": { "question": 16267, "description": "For three years, I’ve watched the Fed choke this recovery to death in the name of fighting phantom inflation. We need a push to get this economy moving again, and Felix Rohatyn is the guy to do it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16277, "fields": { "question": 16267, "description": "For three years, I’ve watched the Fed choke this recovery to death in the name of fighting phantom inflation. We need a push to get this economy moving again, and Felix Rohatyn is the guy to do it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16281, "fields": { "question": 16268, "description": "If we move quickly, control the narrative, and peel off a few moderate northern Republicans, I really think we could get him through." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16283, "fields": { "question": 16268, "description": "I’d love to put Rohatyn on there, but it’s not worth the fight here. He’s probably not going to pass the Senate. Besides, we don’t want to freak out investors this close to the election." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16285, "fields": { "question": 16268, "description": "If we move quickly, control the narrative, and peel off a few moderate northern Republicans, I really think we could get him through." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16305, "fields": { "question": 16304, "description": "Those Iraqis killed on the Highway of Death had just looted and plundered a neighboring country. I didn’t shed any tears for them." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16307, "fields": { "question": 16304, "description": "I respect the voices of those in the party who disagree with me, but I always stand by my actions. I’m confident that the majority of Democrats stand with their President in support of international peace and multilateral coalition action." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16309, "fields": { "question": 16304, "description": "It’s imperative that we make sure the party is on the same page going into this election, and I’m sure we can both make concessions in that area. I promise to appoint a progressive, pro-peace figure as my Secretary of State in my second term, to show how serious I am about making sure everyone has a voice in this party." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16312, "fields": { "question": 16311, "description": "This occupation cannot stand. We’re going to war." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16314, "fields": { "question": 16311, "description": "Bring Saddam to the negotiating table, do whatever you can to reach a negotiated agreement, but we absolutely cannot start a ground war right now. That would kill us. Use every tool you have short of direct military action." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16319, "fields": { "question": 16318, "description": "I seriously doubt that they’re going to listen to the advice of George Bush on how to win elections. Moreover, adventurism abroad would be irresponsible right now, especially in the face of our current domestic and economic challenges." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16321, "fields": { "question": 16318, "description": "We’ve condemned the invasion and pushed for sanctions at the United Nations. We’ve shown toughness without rushing into a foreign conflict guns blazing, ignoring congressional approval, like these people did in Grenada, Libya, and many times covertly in Central America." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16326, "fields": { "question": 16325, "description": "It’s imperative that our allies know we’re present in whatever strife they might be going through, and it’s also important that the American people see it. We’ll be doing a highly publicized diplomatic tour of the Levant, Lebanon and Israel, standing side by side with local leadership to set goals regarding long-term stabilization of the region." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16328, "fields": { "question": 16325, "description": "The Gulf States, places like Bahrain, Qatar and the Emirates, have major potential for growth due to the revenue stream of oil, as they can diversify their economies through investment projects and the like. If we can sell a visit there as an effort to get them to move away from fossil fuels and supercharge their nascent real estate industry, we can finesse it with the base." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16330, "fields": { "question": 16325, "description": "I’m not exactly comfortable talking to the Saudis, but certain sacrifices must be made to secure our trade position; peacetime gives Saudi Arabia a very good outlook going into this decade. Our economy has a major opportunity to gain from further trade ties with them." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16389, "fields": { "question": 16388, "description": "I can’t be the reason millions of Americans lose their pay over political games. Besides, it would be terrible politically to have a government shutdown on my watch like this. After careful consideration, I have decided to sign the budget passed by Congress, however much I disagree with it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16391, "fields": { "question": 16388, "description": "There is nothing more antithetical to my own values than using Americans’ pay and livelihoods as bargaining chips in a game of political brinkmanship. Tell them I’ll do whatever it takes to reach a deal short of agreeing to their current budget proposal." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16393, "fields": { "question": 16388, "description": "I’m not going to sign any agreement that nickels and dimes the American people like this. Medicare and Medicaid are non-negotiable." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16398, "fields": { "question": 16397, "description": "This is a great opportunity to knock out some of those campaign promises of mine that fell through the cracks during the honeymoon. Let’s hone in on education and establish the Citizens’ Literacy Corps and National Teaching Excellence Fund." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16400, "fields": { "question": 16397, "description": "When I was governor, we had tremendous success getting people off the welfare rolls and into the workforce, particularly single mothers, through childcare and health benefits. Let’s set up something like E.T. back in Massachusetts and see where it goes." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16402, "fields": { "question": 16397, "description": "When I was governor, we had tremendous success getting people off the welfare rolls and into the workforce, particularly single mothers, through childcare and health benefits. Let’s set up something like E.T. back in Massachusetts and see where it goes." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16404, "fields": { "question": 16397, "description": "When I was governor, we had tremendous success getting people off the welfare rolls and into the workforce, particularly single mothers, through childcare and health benefits. Let’s set up something like E.T. back in Massachusetts and see where it goes." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16406, "fields": { "question": 16397, "description": "I’m troubled by the rise of radicalism in this country. Organized crime, fundamentalist groups, those kinds of people, they’re getting so prominent. Let’s empower the FBI to go after troublemakers." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16417, "fields": { "question": 16397, "description": "It’s time to take the big steps in going after drug abuse. On the supply side, let’s up the Coast Guard’s budget by 100 million dollars and cut aid to drug-supplying countries that don’t cooperate in going after the dealers. Let’s also invest in anti-drug education, to teach children the dangers of drugs." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16419, "fields": { "question": 16397, "description": "It’s time to take the big steps in going after drug abuse. On the supply side, let’s up the Coast Guard’s budget by 100 million dollars and cut aid to drug-supplying countries that don’t cooperate in going after the dealers. Let’s also invest in anti-drug education, to teach children the dangers of drugs." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16450, "fields": { "question": 724, "description": "We have a chance to shape the post-Soviet order, the type that only comes up once in a lifetime. Let’s work to expand NATO into Eastern Europe and levy our influence to help them adopt Western-style institutions." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16452, "fields": { "question": 724, "description": "Strategic restraint is the name of the game. We should probably avoid getting too tangled in an unpredictable region. We’ll honor all of our current commitments, don’t get me wrong, but let’s prioritize intelligence gathering and focus more on domestic priorities. The economy is still reeling." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16454, "fields": { "question": 724, "description": "Strategic restraint is the name of the game. We should probably avoid getting too tangled in an unpredictable region. We’ll honor all of our current commitments, don’t get me wrong, but let’s prioritize intelligence gathering and focus more on domestic priorities. The economy is still reeling." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16465, "fields": { "question": 719, "description": "We’re only hurting ourselves by acting like the Soviets aren’t potential partners in regional development. Peace is not just the absence of war. Let’s press for a summit between myself, Gorbachev, and Latin American leaders to battle disease, unemployment, and illiteracy together." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16488, "fields": { "question": 16481, "description": "I’m not concerned about Jesse Jackson. His campaigns never go anywhere, and anything we say about him only further elevates his profile." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16490, "fields": { "question": 16481, "description": "Have you seen the types of people on the Republican side? A house divided itself cannot stand, and if we’re divided against them, we’ll collapse like one. We must speak as one party, with one voice." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16503, "fields": { "question": 16482, "description": "Let’s start the campaign as early as possible. Running ads, making visits, really selling the narrative that Democrats are united and that I’m already the nominee. This gives us a valuable chance to set the narrative while Republicans are self-immolating in Iowa and New Hampshire." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16507, "fields": { "question": 16482, "description": "Okay, look, don’t get too cheeky. Everything’s going to be business as usual at the White House. Seeing me as America’s president, getting things done and taking care of the business of government, is worth far more than campaign ads or whistle-stop tours." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16824, "fields": { "question": 16487, "description": "I won’t stand for grandstanding on issues of personal morality and personal conscience, on both moral and political grounds. This country needs someone who will stitch it back together, not tear it apart. There is always room in my coalition for people of different values." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16826, "fields": { "question": 16487, "description": "Lean all the way into it, there’s no way I’m getting any of these pro-lifers back when it was my justices who did this. Besides, it’s a good cause, one that the majority shares. Let’s use strong rhetoric on abortion, gun control, secularism, even women in combat units." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16851, "fields": { "question": 16850, "description": "A President Dole would work hand-in-hand with Newt Gingrich to slash Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security. He’d hike taxes through the roof, destroy the Department of Education, and allow polluters to dump waste into our waterways. This can never come to pass." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16873, "fields": { "question": 16850, "description": "I know I have a reputation for being dispassionate, but at least you know what makes me tick on some level. The middle class, good jobs at good wages, all of that stuff. What makes Bob Dole get up every day? It’s a mystery. Nobody knows, not even his own running mate." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16889, "fields": { "question": 16850, "description": "Bob Dole is just another creature of Washington. He’s an obstructionist, the exact kind of career politician who has worked to stymie progress under myself, my predecessor, and his predecessor. Four years of Dole is four years of gridlock." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16905, "fields": { "question": 16850, "description": "You know, this Dole fellow, he doesn’t believe in the shadowy banker cabal, or any of that “satanic child prostitution” stuff they were shouting about. It’s so out of touch with what the conservative base post-Reagan has become. They might just sit out the campaign altogether…" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16927, "fields": { "question": 16926, "description": "He’s a Nazi. That’s not hyperbole like with Reagan or Goldwater, they’re just his words. Have you seen what he’s said about the Jews, or the homosexuals? Combined with his running mate, who is a member of the White Citizens’ Council, the two are a match made in heaven, or maybe hell." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 16948, "fields": { "question": 16926, "description": "His bigoted ideas are scary, even scarier are how they inform his foreign policy goals. He would destroy our special relationship with Israel or maybe just attack them outright. He’d withdraw from NATO and put our credibility on the line defending Apartheid in South Africa. It’s difficult to imagine the global chaos that would reign under a Buchanan presidency." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17015, "fields": { "question": 17014, "description": "We get it, Jack Kemp was a quarterback. It’s all he talks about, all day long. And if you vote for him thinking you’ll see any of that wealth trickle down, believe me, all you’ll get is a quarter back." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17039, "fields": { "question": 17014, "description": "Jack Kemp hates the idea of a balanced budget. We’ve made significant progress on deficit reduction, he’d nuke it all with another round of tax cuts for the ultra-rich and call it a day. Can we really afford to triple the national debt again?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17063, "fields": { "question": 17014, "description": "We’re going to get in our fair share of attacks on Kemp, but I think we have enough of a record to get away with positive campaigning too. It hasn’t all been smooth sailing these past four years, but I’ve been hard at work for the American people, and these times require an experienced leader like myself. You never change horses midstream." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17087, "fields": { "question": 17014, "description": "The congressman isn’t serious. He doesn’t care about the minutiae of policy and governance. It’s all a game to him, an extension of his days slinging pigskins. Speaking of which, I think Representative Kemp is about to meet a fate very similar to that of his beloved Buffalo Bills." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17117, "fields": { "question": 17116, "description": "Pat Robertson is so sanctimonious. He loves purity tests and he loves telling other people how to live. I’m as good a Christian as anyone else, but it kind of gets on my nerves. Hit him on that angle." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17130, "fields": { "question": 17116, "description": "The guy’s a hypocrite. He waxes on about the love of Christ, but that love is nowhere to be found when he talks about AIDS victims, or really anyone not like him. And don’t ask his running mate what he thinks of Latinos or immigrants, it’s not very Christ-like." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17143, "fields": { "question": 17116, "description": "Look at that book he just published, The New World Order. It’s rife with conspiracy theories about the Illuminati, the Freemasons, and Satan, really bizarre stuff. Most concerning is all this nonsense about Jewish bankers. What did he mean by this?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17156, "fields": { "question": 17116, "description": "Here’s a Bible quote for Pat: 1 Corinthians 15:33. Look around all these crazy groups endorsing him, see who you can find." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17173, "fields": { "question": 17172, "description": "Everything about their operation is bush league. It’s a ticket of D-listers who stumbled into the nomination because the real candidates stayed out. You can either stand with your President, or these people." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17189, "fields": { "question": 17172, "description": "Can you really take this guy’s word at face value? It’s all about slashing the spending and cutting the pork until it’s time to shell out two billion dollars on a particle accelerator in his home state. That’s classic Beltway doublespeak for you." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17202, "fields": { "question": 17172, "description": "He’s not real. He doesn’t exist. Figuratively speaking, of course. We’re running on my achievements, we’re running on economic recovery, and we’re not going to give this joker any undue attention. Since when has Phil Gramm been a household name?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17233, "fields": { "question": 17232, "description": "Is Bob Dornan okay? I mean, look at all that shouting and screaming, even verging on attacking House colleagues. He’s not a well man by any means. He needs help. He should see a therapist." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17247, "fields": { "question": 17232, "description": "Nobody likes Bob Dornan. Have you heard the way other House Republicans talk about him? They find him exhausting. Let’s call up some of them and see if we can secure their endorsements. This is about putting country over party to stop radical extremism." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17261, "fields": { "question": 17232, "description": "I hope not to alarm anyone, but it has come to our attention that Bob Dornan was arrested in 1966 for domestic violence and was even sentenced to jail time. His wife has even made multiple allegations about this kind of thing. That’s a red flag in my book." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17275, "fields": { "question": 17232, "description": "I can think of nothing more demeaning and frustrating than trading blows with Bob Dornan. When you do that, you only legitimize him. Find something positive to work on. Put a sheen on my name, we’ve gotten so much done over the past four years." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17291, "fields": { "question": 17290, "description": "He’s just an “anti-congressman.” Anti-education, anti-science, anti-healthcare, anti-feeding the sick and needy. He’s spent his entire speakership trying to take away everything from everyone. The logical conclusion of that is the presidency; I’m the only one left who stands in his way." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17307, "fields": { "question": 17290, "description": "If he’s so dead set on beating me, why’s he running for reelection to Congress at the same time? If the House balance is close, and it very well might be, he’d jeopardize his own majority by triggering a months-long vacancy in his seat. It’s almost like this whole thing is just an ego trip for him." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17323, "fields": { "question": 17290, "description": "I’m a proud veteran; I served my country in Korea. Meanwhile, Newt was an able young man during Vietnam, seeking deferment after deferment. He’s basically a draft dodger. He wants to tout his Contract with America? Why didn’t he sign a contract with America when duty called?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17339, "fields": { "question": 17290, "description": "I’m afraid the Republican Party has completely lost its mind. You know who else probably feels that way? A lot of our donors, the types with open minds and deep pockets. Let’s go shake a can in New York and see who we can get a hold of." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17366, "fields": { "question": 17365, "description": "He’s a warmonger. Plain and simple. The United States under Donald Rumsfeld would be more concerned with killing than improving life at home." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17384, "fields": { "question": 17365, "description": "What are his domestic policies? He just talks up strength 24/7, but I don’t hear how he plans to make life more affordable while also committing to raising billions for defense spending." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17402, "fields": { "question": 17365, "description": "Buchanan and his ilk can’t be thrilled about this turn of events, right? Maybe we can talk about how Rummy’s own party isn’t even behind him 100%. Drive a wedge between them. Boost some third party freak, or just get them to stay home." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17420, "fields": { "question": 17365, "description": "Surely this can’t be what George Bush wanted when he waded into this crapshoot of a primary contest. He’s hated Rumsfeld since the Ford administration. Let’s meet with him and talk about it. Maybe something interesting could happen." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17445, "fields": { "question": 15946, "description": "We haven’t done too much with the National Alliance Against Drugs so far, that’s a campaign promise we can deliver on. Appoint Lloyd Bentsen chairman to knock out the Drug Czar promise too, and give him a broad mandate. Maybe he can make himself useful there." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17449, "fields": { "question": 15946, "description": "We haven’t done too much with the National Alliance Against Drugs so far, that’s a campaign promise we can deliver on. Appoint Lloyd Bentsen chairman to knock out the Drug Czar promise too, and give him a broad mandate. Maybe he can make himself useful there." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17454, "fields": { "question": 17453, "description": "New answer option" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17458, "fields": { "question": 17453, "description": "New answer option" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17460, "fields": { "question": 17453, "description": "New answer option" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17463, "fields": { "question": 17462, "description": "I want to congratulate my friend and hero Jesse Jackson on a well-run campaign, and for his fight for equal rights for all Americans. Now we must stand together to protect the middle class, raise the minimum wage, fight discrimination, and ensure a better tomorrow for everyone." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17465, "fields": { "question": 17462, "description": "I believe that the American Dream, where all Americans can live and achieve their greatest potential, is still possible. The Democratic project is to make these dreams come true, to build a better future for our children." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17467, "fields": { "question": 17462, "description": "Our opponents, through blocking and deriding our agenda, have tried to build a wall against progress—but we'll reject them this November and create an America that working people deserve." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17481, "fields": { "question": 17480, "description": "Just a couple of months ago, I had the opportunity to deliver an address marking President Kennedy’s 75th birthday. I knelt by the Eternal Flame and recalled how he inspired me to enter public service. Now, at this critical crossroads for this great nation, it is our job to carry that flame." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17483, "fields": { "question": 17480, "description": "Together, we can be the bulwark against extremism. We can build a more perfect union. We can do anything, because were are a movement of people. It’s my honor to bear this torch, and I hope you'll join me in fighting for the America we pass down to our children." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17485, "fields": { "question": 17480, "description": "Some have given up on America’s future, consigning us to the dustbin of terminal decline. I will never think that way. As long as we stand together, as long as we speak with one voice, I will never lose hope for the future of this country." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17488, "fields": { "question": 17487, "description": "Together, we can be the bulwark against extremism. We can build a more perfect union. We can do anything, because were are a movement of people. It’s my honor to bear this torch, and I hope you'll join me in fighting for the America we pass down to our children." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17490, "fields": { "question": 17487, "description": "Some have given up on America’s future, consigning us to the dustbin of terminal decline. I will never think that way. As long as we stand together, as long as we speak with one voice, I will never lose hope for the future of this country." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17492, "fields": { "question": 17487, "description": "Just a couple of months ago, I had the opportunity to deliver an address marking President Kennedy’s 75th birthday. I knelt by the Eternal Flame and recalled how he inspired me to enter public service. Now, at this critical crossroads for this great nation, it is our job to carry that flame." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17495, "fields": { "question": 17494, "description": "Together, we can be the bulwark against extremism. We can build a more perfect union. We can do anything, because were are a movement of people. It’s my honor to bear this torch, and I hope you'll join me in fighting for the America we pass down to our children." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17497, "fields": { "question": 17494, "description": "The Republican Party we see today is not the party of Eisenhower or even the party of Reagan; it has begun to embrace iconoclasts and extremists. I urge them tonight, and all patriotic Americans, to follow your conscience and put party over country." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17499, "fields": { "question": 17494, "description": "I’m honored and proud to have had the privilege to serve the American people over the last four years. I wish for nothing more than your blessing, both in your prayers and in the ballot box over the next four years." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17507, "fields": { "question": 17501, "description": "I want to congratulate my friend and hero Jesse Jackson on a well-run campaign, and for his fight for equal rights for all Americans. Now we must stand together for protecting the middle class, raising the minimum wage, fighting discrimination, and ensuring a better tomorrow for everyone." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17512, "fields": { "question": 17501, "description": "America was founded by a band of pilgrims who found a new home. Many of us came here for new beginnings. Others were not brought voluntarily, and others still have lived here all along. E pluribus unum is the American promise, and we must reject the demagogues who want to tear it all down." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17517, "fields": { "question": 17501, "description": "The Republican Party we see today is not the party of Eisenhower or even the party of Reagan; it has begun to embrace iconoclasts and extremists. I urge them tonight, and all patriotic Americans, to follow your conscience and put party over country." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17523, "fields": { "question": 17480, "description": "Some have given up on America’s future, consigning us to the dustbin of terminal decline. I will never think that way. As long as we stand together, as long as we speak with one voice, I will never lose hope for the future of this country." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17588, "fields": { "question": 15497, "description": "Vice President Bentsen has valuable local connections in the South, particularly Louisiana, and could really help get relief to the areas. He’s going to manage the relief effort while I campaign in key swing states nationally." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17590, "fields": { "question": 15497, "description": "It’s not like me being there will have a significant impact on the recovery effort, but it’s important to show these people that I see their suffering and understand what they’re going through, that they’re not suffering in silence. I plan to visit the worst-hit areas." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17592, "fields": { "question": 15497, "description": "Suspend the campaign. No, seriously, suspend the campaign. Fly me down to Biloxi and set up a temporary regional headquarters where the White House people can interface directly with community leaders and disaster relief organizations, coordinating the relief effort. This is our chance; we can’t throw it away." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17608, "fields": { "question": 15693, "description": "There is a certain group of swing states in the Great Lakes area that always decide these elections. I don’t see why we need to deviate from that. Let’s hit Wisconsin and Michigan, and then hold the last stop in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17610, "fields": { "question": 15693, "description": "We’re in prime position to flip a lot of these so-called Republican states in the northeast. We got Connecticut last time, I think we’ve got a fighting chance at New Jersey and Delaware now. Those are the three to hit, I think." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17612, "fields": { "question": 15693, "description": "I think that the Republicans are taking states in the Sun Belt for granted, states like Nevada, Arizona, and Florida. The Latino vote is trending towards us and we’ve got a great ground game in some of these areas. Let’s visit there and give them a shock." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17614, "fields": { "question": 15693, "description": "If we play our cards right, we could definitely pull out a few states in the south. We carried Louisiana last time, I think we could get it along with Arkansas and Tennessee this time. How many voters in Tennessee really want to cut Social Security and disband the TVA?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17633, "fields": { "question": 17632, "description": "Lloyd is still popular down in the Lone Star State. Why don’t we send him down there for a bit? He can wield the party machinery to benefit some of our downballot candidates in the southwest, and who knows, maybe he could even make the difference in carrying the state this time around." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17635, "fields": { "question": 17632, "description": "He’s not Elvis, but he is the sitting Vice President. I don’t think we have any better options than just sending him out to stump for us like the rest of them. Maybe he could get out a few more zingers like he did against Quayle last time." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17637, "fields": { "question": 17632, "description": "I know that Lloyd Bentsen isn’t the most riveting man in the world, but he doesn’t need to be. Let’s use him as our intermediary to the business world; his connections there run deep. We’re going to need all the funds we can get." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17650, "fields": { "question": 17649, "description": "Front and center. He’s young and handsome, a new type of Democrat, just like myself. He’s like if Lloyd Bentsen were 30 years younger and about 25 percent more charismatic." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17652, "fields": { "question": 17649, "description": "I think Al Gore can inject some good old-fashioned southern populism into our campaign. Let’s have him talk about rural issues and family values." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17654, "fields": { "question": 17649, "description": "For years now, Al Gore has really been on the cutting edge of issues like technology and the environment. I really think we could use him to connect with young voters on some of these critical issues shaping the world they’ll live in." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17681, "fields": { "question": 17680, "description": "She’s everything I’m not, which is everything we’ve been hoping for. Make sure she gets as much attention as possible, and plaster my name all over her speeches. That glass ceiling won’t know what hit it this November." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17683, "fields": { "question": 17680, "description": "I really hate to say this, but there’s a big portion of America that might not be comfortable with a woman on the ticket. We’re not hiding her away or anything, but we’re going to present a coherent message and make sure that we don’t muddle the narrative." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17685, "fields": { "question": 17680, "description": "You know, Barbara’s story really reminds me of my own. Descended from immigrants, her Polish-American grandparents owned a bakery in Baltimore. She’s based a lot of her political appeal off of standing for ethnic Americans, and I think she could really help by appealing to them." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17701, "fields": { "question": 17700, "description": "…" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17707, "fields": { "question": 17706, "description": "Pat Buchanan, listen to what I say very carefully. You don’t know what we went through in those months, the pain my family went through. I never want to hear my brother’s name come out of your mouth ever again." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17713, "fields": { "question": 17706, "description": "No I don’t. I don’t really think the public is entitled to my perspective on something like this. It’s clear what he’s suggesting, and it’s obvious that I didn’t kill my brother." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17721, "fields": { "question": 17720, "description": "I oppose the death penalty on a philosophical level, but I think we could use it strategically once or twice before election day to make a point. Find someone bad, like a serial murderer or something, lift the moratorium, and I’ll sign his death warrant." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17723, "fields": { "question": 17720, "description": "You can be tough on crime without going around executing people at the drop of a hat. That’s what we intend to do. We support mandatory minimums, we support three strikes laws, and we support empowering our police to ensure safety in their communities" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17725, "fields": { "question": 17720, "description": "My conscience is abundantly clear on the death penalty issue. It’s immoral, inaccurate, and does not reduce crime. I support toughness on crime and order in American streets, but I will never compromise my values in pursuit of it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17727, "fields": { "question": 17720, "description": "It’s interesting how much these politicians care about the rule of law when it comes to everyday Americans, but when their own President sells weapons to Iran or funds mass-murdering death squads in Central America, nothing is awry. One set of laws for them, another for you." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17739, "fields": { "question": 17738, "description": "I understand the concerns domestic workers have. I have a plan to secure the border, bring illegal aliens out of the shadows, and protect the jobs of American workers. What we do not need is a President who wants to rip apart families with Gestapo tactics. That would only make the problem worse." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17741, "fields": { "question": 17738, "description": "Neil Diamond is a great American. I seriously doubt he was referring to an illegal alien invasion when he wrote that song." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17743, "fields": { "question": 17738, "description": "Like many Americans, I’m a proud son of immigrants. I can’t help but wonder what would have happened if Pat Buchanan had his way. Would my parents have been rounded up and expelled, or would they have been rejected from Ellis Island in the first place?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17745, "fields": { "question": 17738, "description": "Compatriotas estadounidenses, jamás permitiré que Pat Buchanan los separe de su país y de sus familias." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17771, "fields": { "question": 17770, "description": "This is definitely concerning, don’t get me wrong, but is it really worth leaking this thing? Everyone already knows the guy’s a Nazi. His public quotes make that clear enough and if we get caught doing this, we look sneaky. It’s not worth the risk, do away with it. " } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17773, "fields": { "question": 17770, "description": "I don’t care if the scandal is Pat Buchanan allegedly littering 30 years ago. Drop everything we have on him, tarnish his image as much as possible." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17783, "fields": { "question": 17782, "description": "McCain’s comment speaks for itself. We should stick to talking about the issues, commenting on such a hurtful quotation would only bring more attention to it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17785, "fields": { "question": 17782, "description": "I think this kind of crude comment doesn’t reflect well on Senator McCain’s temperament. Are these the kinds of leaders we want inspiring our children, people who use cruel terms that denigrate large groups of people? I call on all Americans to embrace decency and reject this kind of language." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17787, "fields": { "question": 17782, "description": "I’m outraged and offended that Senator McCain would throw around that word. We’re going to make an explicit play for Asian-American voters. We’ll canvass their communities, fund our outreach groups in their communities, and do whatever it takes to flip these patriotic Americans into my column." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17802, "fields": { "question": 17801, "description": "There are proud, patriotic Muslims, Hindus, and Jews in this country, my wife among them, who I’m sure would resent the notion that only a Christian can be a good president. They vote, too. I wonder what they would think of Robertson’s insinuations." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17804, "fields": { "question": 17801, "description": "This desperate, dishonest attempt to divide fellow followers of Christ is a new low from the Robertson campaign. I believe in the Father, the Son, and the Holy Spirit, the same one that Catholics and Protestants do, and I’m not ashamed to say so." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17806, "fields": { "question": 17801, "description": "I’m not a good Christian? I’m private and personal about my deep faith, like most Americans. Pat Robertson uses his religion to swindle people for personal gain. Remember when he predicted the world would end in 1982? Last time I checked, we’re all still here." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17808, "fields": { "question": 17801, "description": "No, no, we’ve got this all wrong. We’re never going to win this thing if we just respond to all of these attacks. That means Pat sets the terms. Let’s find the real victims, people who lost family members due to AIDS, abortion bans, and a lack of healthcare. They shouldn’t have to suffer in silence." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17822, "fields": { "question": 17821, "description": "Where did you find this stuff? Did you find it legally? We’re not the Mafia. We’re not like him. Get all of this out of my sight. It’s slimy, and even if it weren’t, it’s far too risky." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17824, "fields": { "question": 17821, "description": "This is outrageous. It’s unethical. The people deserve to know. Leak it all." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17833, "fields": { "question": 17832, "description": "Oh no he doesn’t. Let’s undercut this by campaigning heavily in the swing states in the south, states like Florida, Louisiana, and even Gramm’s own Texas. That’s the type of bold move that’ll keep the headlines off of his little sideshow." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17835, "fields": { "question": 17832, "description": "When Gramm talks about “reducing waste,” that’s code for cutting Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security, make no mistake about it. I’ll do everything in my power to protect programs that give the everyday American a leg up." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17837, "fields": { "question": 17832, "description": "Just keep running ads nationally. He’s like a discount Ronald Reagan, no, George Bush, his running mate is even a bargain bin Dan Quayle. It’s just reheated rot from yesteryear, the entire ticket." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17839, "fields": { "question": 17832, "description": "Hit him on being a party-switcher. He even ran for the Senate as a Democrat back in ‘76. Love me or hate me, I’ve always played for the same team. Who’s to say that Gramm won’t switch back to the Democrats, and back to the Republicans after that?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17854, "fields": { "question": 17853, "description": "What laws were broken here? Is there even a conflict of interest, or any kind of ethical breach here? This is dirty and far too risky. Do away with all of this now, I don’t want to see any of this ever again." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17856, "fields": { "question": 17853, "description": "I can’t stand it when these types of people position themselves as the morality police. Leak it all." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17863, "fields": { "question": 17862, "description": "I seriously doubt West Virginia, Ohio, or Kentucky will go Republican this year. Instead, let’s campaign in the deepest of Republican states to expand our map as much as possible." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17865, "fields": { "question": 17862, "description": "If Dornan wants to bring up abortion, that’s his loss. Even in states like these, you’ll find that majorities of these voters support pro-choice policies, or just don’t care all that much about the issue." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17867, "fields": { "question": 17862, "description": "The thought had crossed my mind before. Let’s invite Wendell Ford and Jay Rockefeller to the White House, to shoot some high-quality ads where we talk about the issues affecting farmers and coal miners." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17869, "fields": { "question": 17862, "description": "Yes. We should move quickly and aggressively to counteract this, with extensive campaigning of our own in the region." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17917, "fields": { "question": 17916, "description": "How did you even get your hands on this story? I don’t ever want to hear about this ever again. Not in a million years. I wouldn’t be caught dead doing that to some poor kid…" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17919, "fields": { "question": 17916, "description": "Do what you have to do." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17927, "fields": { "question": 17926, "description": "He claims to reject militia movements and sovereign citizens? I call BS, they’re all connected in the weird world of right wing politics. Scour all of those connections, find his Willie Horton." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17929, "fields": { "question": 17926, "description": "Knight to D3. Bring up his ethics investigation, his corruption and untrustworthiness, his backroom maneuverings in the House. You want corrupt, hypocritical rascals out of government? Good. Start with the Speaker of the House." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17931, "fields": { "question": 17926, "description": "Newt is just another partisan politician. You can’t tell me all these THRO guys, who are all nonpartisan and against the establishment, are suddenly falling in line for a partisan hack like Gingrich. We can drive them apart." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17943, "fields": { "question": 17942, "description": "I’m so beyond caring about civility when Gingrich is calling me a sick, corrupt communist elite on television every day. Destroy him." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17945, "fields": { "question": 17942, "description": "Did you obtain all this legally? What if it gets traced back to us? The last thing we need is a special prosecutor combing through the Executive Branch while we’re on campaign. We have plenty of juicy attacks that don’t involve any Nixonian scheming, he’s Newt Gingrich for Christ’s sake." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17956, "fields": { "question": 17955, "description": "Let’s get the facts straight: I refused to send American boys into another Vietnam quagmire. We are internationally engaged and committed to condemning Saddam Hussein, but I will not allow the United States to be dragged into another decades-long conflict." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17958, "fields": { "question": 17955, "description": "He wants to play Churchill? How does Iraq threaten the United States? Nazi Germany posed an imminent threat to Churchill and Great Britain. It’s all melodrama. We are more than a thousand miles away." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17960, "fields": { "question": 17955, "description": "Christ, he met with Saddam. Get those pictures on the air, him shaking hands with the man he’s claiming threatens the international order. I’m working to hold these dictators accountable, Rumsfeld just wants to shake hands with them." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17973, "fields": { "question": 17972, "description": "All part of the plan. Things are working. Let’s stay on track and work it into our lineup of talking points." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17975, "fields": { "question": 17972, "description": "This is great news. Let’s see if we can land an interview, so that Americans can hear it straight from the horse’s mouth." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17981, "fields": { "question": 17980, "description": "All part of the plan. Things are working. Let’s stay on track and work it into our lineup of talking points." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17984, "fields": { "question": 17980, "description": "This is great news. Let’s see if we can land an interview, so that Americans can hear it straight from the horse’s mouth." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17991, "fields": { "question": 17990, "description": "This just isn’t something we should go around bringing up. It’s a losing issue." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17993, "fields": { "question": 17990, "description": "Not good. Let’s see if we can land an interview, so that Americans can hear what’s going on directly from myself." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 17999, "fields": { "question": 17998, "description": "This is embarrassing. It absolutely isn’t something we should go talking to people about. Bury it, it’s a losing issue." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18001, "fields": { "question": 17998, "description": "We should try to control the framing on this issue. Let’s see if we can land an interview, so that Americans can hear what’s going on directly from myself." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18017, "fields": { "question": 18016, "description": "What Pat Buchanan says is simply disqualifying for the Presidency of the United States. The President represents the people. When Buchanan claims the Holocaust didn’t happen, or that Israel controls the American government, does he speak for you?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18019, "fields": { "question": 18016, "description": "Under my leadership, the Soviet Union has fallen, and we have defended American interests around the globe. Under my opponent, the United States would withdraw from the United Nations and NATO and end all international trade, bringing economic ruin at home and abroad." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18021, "fields": { "question": 18016, "description": "I’m never going to stoop as low as Pat Buchanan. Voters need to hear my plan for the economy, what I’m going to do for them. Your wallet and your income matter more than anything that rabble-rouser spews." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18032, "fields": { "question": 18031, "description": "Dole is so boring and predictable. Every time he opens his mouth, he spews the same five or ten talking points, no variation whatsoever. His rhythm is hardly a mystery, the trick will be to throw him off it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18034, "fields": { "question": 18031, "description": "Alright, put your thinking caps on. Bob Dole claims he will pass a balanced budget amendment, while cutting income taxes across the board by 15 percent, while cutting the capital gains tax, without significant cuts to Medicare, Social Security, or the defense budget. How are those numbers supposed to add up?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18036, "fields": { "question": 18031, "description": "Remember when Dole’s running mate led protests against school integration back in the 70s? I sure do. I’d love to litigate out that issue in front of 65 million people." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18088, "fields": { "question": 18087, "description": "Good old Jack Kemp. He claims to fight for the poor and downtrodden, yet he proselytizes the same supply-side doctrine that leaves them by the wayside. He represents a stronghold for organized labor while championing the policies of my union-busting predecessor. He’s served in Congress for two decades, and does nothing but talk about football." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18090, "fields": { "question": 18087, "description": "Remember in the primaries how the conservatives felt about this guy? They didn’t like him one bit. Let’s drive them apart. I must say, I am impressed by Congressman Kemp’s forward-thinking stances on immigration, affirmative action, and especially the rights of gay Americans." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18092, "fields": { "question": 18087, "description": "My opponent has his head in the clouds, making all these comparisons. He acts like he’s the next Jack Kennedy. Believe me, Congressman…" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18177, "fields": { "question": 18176, "description": "I am a proud Christian, which means that I love my neighbor, regardless of race, sex, or even if they’re Christian at all. My opponent, on the other hand, is obsessed with who you are, what you worship, and who you love. He only cares about the people who fit into his narrow sense of morality." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18179, "fields": { "question": 18176, "description": "You know, I’ve gotten tired of hearing from Pat Robertson about how true Christianity is doing everything his way. How, if you don’t pray or read the Bible ten times a day, you’re some kind of heathen. This type of purity-test politics is ripped straight from the McCarthyist playbook and has no place in the 21st century." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18181, "fields": { "question": 18176, "description": "Pat Robertson talks a lot about the Bible, but has he heard of The Wealth of Nations? Does he understand the importance of expanding our middle class, creating new jobs, and investing in healthcare, education, and Social Security? I’m interested to hear whether he plans to do these things if he were elected President." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18238, "fields": { "question": 18237, "description": "Phil Gramm wants to be seen as some economic genius, but we’ve seen his policies in action before. He was on the frontlines, making the wealthiest one-percent pay fewer in taxes than working families back in ‘81. What happened? The rich got richer and the middle class struggled." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18242, "fields": { "question": 18237, "description": "I believe we must do more to protect the most vulnerable Americans in our country, those who would slide into destitution if not for Medicaid and Medicare. Senator Gramm and his Republican colleagues believe the opposite. Mark my words: if Mr. Gramm and the Republicans win next November, these services will be on the chopping block." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18246, "fields": { "question": 18237, "description": "Republicans like Phil Gramm talk about family values. I have one of my own. I believe that a stronger America starts with strong families. Phil Gramm’s plans for the economy would tax working families more than the richest Americans. There’s nothing pro-family about that." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18295, "fields": { "question": 18294, "description": "If nothing else, we have our receipts. Yes, it says in the congressional record that Bob Dornan called Vladimir Posner a, quote, “disloyal, betraying little Jew.” Do you mind explaining to the five and a half million Jewish Americans, my wife among them, what you meant by that?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18299, "fields": { "question": 18294, "description": "We have accomplished much together over the past four years. We’ve grown the economy, passed hallmark legislation, and won the peace in the now-former Soviet Union. It would be foolish to throw it all away, to gamble on someone like Congressman Dornan." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18303, "fields": { "question": 18294, "description": "Let’s switch gears and talk foreign policy, that’s sure to catch him off guard. Secretary Mondale and I have been hard at work paving the pathway to stability in Eastern Europe, working hand-in-hand to forge emerging nations into lasting democracies. What is my opponent’s plan on the matter? Nobody knows." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18308, "fields": { "question": 18307, "description": "We need to flip the script. What is Rumsfeld’s plan to assist the republics of the former Soviet Union? We have in place a plan to assist these new nations in the transition to a Western, democratic order." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18312, "fields": { "question": 18307, "description": "Look, I’m prepared to deal with Saddam Hussein however need be. If the United Nations deems a military response necessary, then the United States will act accordingly." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18316, "fields": { "question": 18307, "description": "I will say this line until I am blue in the face: We are not committing military forces to a needless conflict with Iraq. I will not have another Vietnam mess under my presidency." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18321, "fields": { "question": 18320, "description": "I don’t think we can trust a man like Newt Gingrich. Look at his record. His time away from war, his dealings, his wives. Look at the way the man carries himself. Hell, Sonny Bono is telling him to shut up! Is the character you expect from a President? The integrity?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18325, "fields": { "question": 18320, "description": "Here’s what’s going on. Gingrich wants me to take the first strike. He wants me to be the villain, the aggressor, so he can throw bile with impunity. I won’t play. We’re going to stick to my fundamentals, a civil discussion on our economic priorities, and come out on top." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18329, "fields": { "question": 18320, "description": "Let’s look at the men who have signed this Contract. Tom DeLay. Bob Dornan. Groups like the Heritage Foundation. Make no mistake, this is a kind face on an ugly series of proposals, attempting to dismantle the foundations of the New Deal and undo fifty years of progress." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18432, "fields": { "question": 18320, "description": "Gingrich has spent his entire life in Washington, and in that time all he has done is smear, obstruct, and assault. He has violated the ethics of his position for his own gain and to aid his radical, partisan agenda. If Gingrich is how you govern America, then we are in a very sorry state." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 18439, "fields": { "question": 18307, "description": "America has entered a new age of global cooperation. The United States of America is prepared to project strength not through military means, but through diplomacy and business." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 19085, "fields": { "question": 16926, "description": "Pat Buchanan campaigned for David Duke after the Senate expelled him. That’s all we really need to say. He’s palling around with these wackos, these far-right freaks, while I’m busy fighting for working families." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 19169, "fields": { "question": 16926, "description": "This is just the Republican Party. All the ones you thought were independent thinkers, they’re lining up behind him, because his bigotry and his antics don’t matter as long as they can keep using trickle-down economics to line the pockets of the wealthy." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 19641, "fields": { "question": 17462, "description": "It is a great privilege to serve as your President. I see no greater honor than working every day and every night to ensure that the American people are safe, happy, and prosperous." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 19643, "fields": { "question": 17480, "description": "It is a great privilege to serve as your President. I see no greater honor than working every day and every night to ensure that the American people are safe, happy, and prosperous." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 19646, "fields": { "question": 17487, "description": "The Republican Party we see today is not the party of Eisenhower or even the party of Reagan; it has begun to embrace iconoclasts and extremists. I urge them tonight, and all patriotic Americans, to follow your conscience and put party over country." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 19650, "fields": { "question": 17494, "description": "America was founded by a band of pilgrims who found a new home. Many of us came here for new beginnings. Others were not brought voluntarily, and others still have lived here all along. E pluribus unum is the American promise, and we must reject the demagogues who want to tear it all down." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 19660, "fields": { "question": 17501, "description": "Together, we can be the bulwark against extremism. We can build a more perfect union. We can do anything, because were are a movement of people. It's my honor to bear this torch, and I hope you'll join me in fighting for the America we pass down to our children." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 19676, "fields": { "question": 16136, "description": "None of this weird back-and-forth sparring stuff. Talk about the issues. Jobs, wages, healthcare, things like that. We have plans and the means by which to enact them, so I wouldn’t consider this presidency over by any means." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 19715, "fields": { "question": 15844, "description": "I don’t see any reason why we can’t try to meet somewhere in the middle. We have a lot of more ambitious proposals in this plan, things like the employer mandate, that we can use as bargaining chips to get the rest of the thing through." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 19720, "fields": { "question": 15853, "description": "Let’s not complicate this too much. We can push it through in the budget bill using reconciliation. It’ll expose our plan to more negotiations and the ability to be watered down, but we can’t let perfect be the enemy of good enough." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 19724, "fields": { "question": 17782, "description": "On the topic of McCain, what concerns me more than this foul remark is the way he improperly interfered with the FHLBB on behalf of Charles Keating and Lincoln Financial. It’s cheating the system, plain and simple. The integrity of our financial regulators can never be impugned like this." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 19726, "fields": { "question": 19725, "description": "Governor King wants you to believe that he will stop crime. Under his last governorship, crime went up thirty percent. Governor King wants you to believe that he will roll back your taxes. Under his last governorship, he fell short of his promise by 340 million dollars. I think I’m noticing a pattern." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 19728, "fields": { "question": 19725, "description": "Thank you for joining me today, Governor. Before we begin the debate, I want to make an offer to you. This election is about America’s children, not our past. If you abstain from any attacks personal in nature or regarding my governorship, I am more than happy to reciprocate." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 19730, "fields": { "question": 19725, "description": "I’m kind of amazed that Governor King has never said a word about foreign policy. With all the global upheaval in places like Russia, the Middle East, and Central America, you have to be knowledgeable about this kind of thing. Tell me, what is your plan?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 19735, "fields": { "question": 19734, "description": "Just keep hitting him with scandals until he cracks.
