As the House vote nears, what’s your plan to salvage this before it’s too late?", "likelihood": 1 } } } // Checks your response to Iraq invading Kuwait if (ans == 16119){ noResponse = true; } if (ans == 16121){ bombing = true; } if (ans == 16123){ coalition = true; } // Checks who you pick as your VP on Q17, so they can show up later in the campaign portion if (ans == 4431) { vp = "gore"; } if (ans == 4432) { vp = "mikulski"; } if (ans == 4433 || ans == 16250) { vp = "lloyd"; } // Q11, checks if you passed or failed on Healthcare if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 9 && healthcarePassed == true) { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[10] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 16029, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "With the midterms looming and your approvals sinking, you have elected to head back to Capitol Hill one more time to pad out your résumé before the campaign kicks into gear. Foley is warning you that this is your last shot before Congress adjourns to defend their seats, so you’ve got to make it count.", "likelihood": 1 } } } if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 9 && healthcarePassed == false) { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[10] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 15946, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "The passage of time has yet to dispel the dark cloud that has formed over your presidency since your healthcare reform effort ended in failure. With the midterms looming and no signature reform under your belt, your inner circle has scrambled back to the drawing board in one last attempt to attain a major success before the summer is out. Foley is warning you that this is your last shot before Congress adjourns to defend their seats, so if you want to make your way out of the pines before the midterms, this is your last shot to do it.", "likelihood": 1 } } } // Q12, does a check for the Midterms if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 10 && victories < 2) { // worst congress = false; king += 1; campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[11] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 16077, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "You knew it was going to be bad, but you didn’t realize it was going to be this bad. Seat after seat is swallowed by the Republican tsunami, Bradley, Harkin, and Kerry all struck down by the THRO revolt. Worst of all, J. Bennett Johnston in Louisiana is toppled by David Duke, to the horror of Democrats and Republicans alike. As Edward King delivers his victory speech in your native Massachusetts, it’s clear that the political winds are changing.", "likelihood": 1 } } } if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 10 && victories == 2) { // mixed campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[11] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 16078, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "As November arrives, the voters greet it with a resounding rejection of your administration. Of course, Democrats still hold both chambers of Congress, but their margins are significantly reduced, and the House majority is cut to a handful of votes amidst an anti-incumbent revolt from THRO. Nonetheless, it’s clear that the political wins have shifted, and your administration is now on the back foot. What is your reaction to this?", "likelihood": 1 } } } if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 10 && victories > 2) { // best wonMidterms = true; campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[11] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 16079, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "As November arrives, your war room hunkers down, only to be pleasantly surprised by a good year. The THRO revolt falls flat on its face despite your vulnerability, and Senate Democrats are pleasantly surprised to see Rudy Boschwitz of Minnesota unseated by a young professor running an insurgent campaign. Republicans claim a few scattered victories, but there’s no spinning that the conservative wave seems more like a conservative trickle. What’s your response to this turn of events?", "likelihood": 1 } } } // Q13, checks for a whole bunch of things if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 11 && saddam <= -2) { // Iraq invades Kuwait campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[12] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 16118, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Your administration has been blindsided by breaking news coming out of the Persian Gulf, where Iraqi forces under dictator Saddam Hussein have launched a brutal and short conquest of neighboring Kuwait. Democrats on the Hill would prefer that you find a diplomatic solution to the matter, while the nebulous foreign policy establishment seems to think you could benefit from showing some strength here. All eyes are on you, the leader of the free world, to respond.", "likelihood": 1 } } } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 11 && congress == false) { // No Kuwait, GOP Congress campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[12] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 16127, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "The dust has yet to settle from that Tuesday night massacre, but you don’t have time to dwell on it. It doesn’t matter if they’re writing your political obituary, you get up and keep going. You don’t know any other way. As the ball drops on New Year’s Eve and 1991 rolls around, you’ve got a State of the Union address to deliver a newly-inaugurated Republican Congress. What will be the topic of your speech?", "likelihood": 1 } } } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 11 && wonMidterms == true) { // No Kuwait, Dems won the Midterms campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[12] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 16145, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Going into 1991, you have come to preside over two distinct lands. In one of them, you sputter along, barely treading water in the eyes of an increasingly disaffected public. However, recessed within the concrete jungles and marble columns of Washington, there is another country. Here, your sway is considerable and even growing. Now your allies are looking to you to fight for an “assault weapons” ban, introduced into Congress in the wake of the Stockton school massacre. Don’t be fooled by your stature, the mighty NRA is no easy opponent. What’s the move?", "likelihood": 1 } } } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 11) { // No Kuwait, mixed Midterm campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[12] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 16136, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "It’s the Wild West out there. Republicans are mocking your midterm losses, Democrats are mocking them back for failing to retake either chamber of Congress, and you’re just trying to figure out where to go from here. Fortunately, as the New Year’s ball drops and 1991 rolls around, you’ve got a chance to tell the people exactly what you’ve got planned out at this year’s State of the Union address. Now you just have to figure out exactly what that is.", "likelihood": 1 } } } // Q14, Q15, Q18, checks who holds Congress if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 12 && congress == false) { // GOP Congress campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[13] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 16224, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Coming out of your State of the Union address, a hapless Robert Michel has been ousted by bomb-thrower Newt Gingrich, the leader of a THRO-emboldened clan of GOP jacobins. After snooping around for any hint of corruption and claiming the scalps of Secretaries Norton and Gray, Gingrich’s cronies on Oversight have zeroed in on their biggest target yet: Walter Mondale. Pointing to your Secretary of State’s alleged campaign finance violations in his race against Gary Hart, the Speaker is raising the specter of impeachment hearings. How do you plan to avert this nationally-televised nightmare for your administration?", "likelihood": 1 } } campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[14] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 16268, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "As the economy continues to sputter along, you’ve been looking to give it a kick and get it going again. Now, it seems like you have a chance to make something happen. Alan Greenspan’s term as Federal Reserve chairman is set to expire in a couple of months. Greenspan is decidedly anti-growth; you’d love to fire him and replace him with Felix Rohatyn, but you’re under no illusion that Dole would let this fly in the Senate. If you really wanted, you could try to push Rohatyn through, but that requires Republican votes and risks failing. What’s the plan?", "likelihood": 1 } } campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[17] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 16388, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Apparently not content with ripping your cabinet apart on C-SPAN, Gingrich has decided the next lever of power he intends to weaponize is the federal budget process. If you don’t reach an agreement with Congress to fund the federal government by the end of the month, it will enter a shutdown, workers furloughed and services halted. Dole and Gingrich are unblinking, standing by their proposal to shred education and healthcare as the clock ticks down. You have a decision to make.", "likelihood": 1 } } } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 12 && congress == true) { // Democratic Congress campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[13] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 16225, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "As the 102nd Congress is gaveled into its opening session, the Republicans’ failure to take back Congress after two years of President Dukakis has only amplified their fury at their own leaders. This has culminated in the ousting of House Minority Leader Robert Michel, replaced by Newt Gingrich, a partisan bomb-thrower from Georgia. Neutered by Tom Foley for now, Gingrich has promised to rally the troops against you in hopes of flipping Congress and the Presidency in 1992. How will you handle him?", "likelihood": 1 } } campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[14] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 16267, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "In just a couple of months, Alan Greenspan’s term as Federal Reserve chairman is set to expire, and the economy is still lagging. Your team has largely been operating under the assumption that you won’t reappoint the decidedly anti-growth Greenspan. Bob Reich and Ira Jackson have been very forward in advancing Felix Rohatyn as a better candidate, someone who will give the economy a bump. Will you follow their advice?", "likelihood": 1 } } campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[17] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 16397, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "You can only ignore the issues piling outside your door for so long. Incomes are shrinking, crime and drugs still plague the streets, and trust in government after eight years of your predecessor is still in the gutter. These are the issues that come to mind as you piece together the FY93 budget with Donna Brazile and the OMB. Keep in mind that this is the last budget you will submit to Congress before the election, so people will remember what you prioritize here come campaign season.", "likelihood": 1 } } } // Q16, checks for Iraq invasion of Kuwait + your response to it if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 13 && coalition == true) { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[15] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 16304, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Ever since you went to war in the Persian Gulf, you’ve been able to finesse the issue enough to keep it from pulling apart the party, but cracks are beginning to show. Your progressive base thought you were different from the ultra-hawkish Reagan, and on college campuses, they call you a warmonger, plastering images from the Highway of Death on every lamppost, bellowing about your “astroturfed” propaganda campaign to drum up support for military action. How can you keep it together until the election?", "likelihood": 1 } } } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 13 && bombing == true) { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[15] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 16311, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Despite the interest you have taken in monitoring the air campaign against the Iraqi occupation over the past several months, it’s unclear how sustainable this is, especially since the Iraqis managed to shoot down an Air Force F-117 last week. The pilot was rescued, but the public has begun to reach the same conclusion long held by General Colin Powell: A bombing campaign alone, however heavy, is insufficient to force a withdrawal and cessation of hostilities. This leaves you a decision to make. With the primary contest looming, a ground war in the Persian Gulf would catastrophically split the party, but letting Saddam off the hook so close to the election wouldn’t exactly look good either.", "likelihood": 1 } } } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 13 && noResponse == true) { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[15] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 16318, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "As the economy continues to shrug off the oil shock created by the Iraqi occupation of Kuwait, a seismic shift has started to form in the GOP ahead of the primary season. Outrage over your weakness abroad has drowned out isolationists like Pat Buchanan, and reports have started to circulate within the Beltway that George Bush has become personally invested in the effort to prevent you from winning a second term. What do you think about this possibility?", "likelihood": 1 } } } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 13) { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[15] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 16325, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "A rare split-second of peace in the Middle East over your presidency, however unstable, has opened doors for diplomacy in the region. As the Arab World and Israel turn their eyes to the next millenium and the ensuing diversification of the broader Middle Eastern economy that many speculate will be coming with it, the United States likely stands to gain from a presidential visit. The destination is yours to choose from. Keep in mind that, no matter where you go, the eyes of the media and public perception will follow.", "likelihood": 1 } } } // Q20, checks for primary challenge based on base anger if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 18 && angryBase >= 2) { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[19] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 16481, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "The Bounty, whose model sits on the Oval Office coffee table, sails once more. You are Captain Bligh, and Jesse Jackson is your Fletcher Christian. Like a phoenix rising from the ashes, he has returned for a third straight bid for the Democratic nomination, presenting himself as a moral, progressive alternative to you. Preaching about the need to restore America’s soul after twelve years of defeats, betrayals, and setbacks, Jackson’s speeches are drawing diverse audiences across the nation. What’s the plan to put down this mutiny?", "likelihood": 1 } } } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 18) { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[19] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 16482, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "It’s campaign season again, and with it comes the primary contest. You’ve never had the most captivating personality, and there have long been rumors that a more colorful character would toss their hat into the ring against you. However, after careful behind-the-scenes cajoling and electioneering, you have ensured your uncontested renomination, save for a few scattered rabble-rousers like Lyndon LaRouche and James Traficant. What do you want to do with your time while the Republicans are busy pulling each other apart?", "likelihood": 1 } } } if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 18 && noResponse == true) { rummy += 1; } // Q23, formally locks in your Republican Opponent if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 21 && king >= 5) { // Edward King campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].first_name = "Edward J."; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].last_name = "King"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].first_name = "Eugene"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].last_name = "McCarthy/Others"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].color_hex = "#B34949"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[1]["fields"].color_hex = "#3A4080"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].color_hex = "#D3BC8D"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].color_hex = "#75B34D"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].first_name = "Howard"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].last_name = "Phillips"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].color_hex = "#D3BC8D"; opName = "Edward J. King"; HistHexcolour = ["#3A4080", "#B34949", "#D3BC8D", "#75B34D"]; HistName = [ " Michael Dukakis", " Edward J. King", " Howard Phillips", " Eugene McCarthy/Others", ]; HistEV = [319, 219, 0, 0]; HistPV = [" 52,338,048", " 50,714,498", " 1,383,484", " 932,608"]; HistPVP = ["49.7%", "48.1%", "1.3%", "0.9%"]; campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[22] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 19743, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Maybe you’ve gotten a little too good at playing this divided government game. You’ve been one step ahead of Gingrich for over a year at this point, and THRO has lost all confidence in him. Somehow, some way, their quest for an outsider has led them to a new conduit: Ed King. Accepting the nomination at the Republican National Convention in San Diego, the governor’s pitch is simple: “I know how to win, and I know how to beat Michael Dukakis.” As the media eats up the “feud of the century,” how are you going to dispatch this old bastard?", "likelihood": 1 } } campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[26] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 19734, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "It’s like you’re suffering from déjà vu. You have no idea how you’re not beating him three-to-one, how it’s not a total blowout, but the man persists, shrugging off his campaign missteps and abysmal record with astonishing ease. The old Baltimore Colts lineman, the genial back-slapping Irishman from Boston, promising to fix this country’s heart, soul, and streets. They’re eating it up.", "likelihood": 1 } } campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[27] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 19725, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "You are on the debate stage alongside King, flashing a smile just wide enough to mask your utter disdain for the man before you and his political project. You know for a fact that he feels the same way. How will you handle what will hopefully be the last ninety minutes you ever spend face to face with Ed King?", "likelihood": 1 } } } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 21 && newt >= 2) { // Newt Gingrich campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].first_name = "Newt"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].last_name = "Gingrich"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].first_name = "Sonia"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].last_name = "Johnson/Others"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].color_hex = "#813227"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[1]["fields"].color_hex = "#2a5c9c"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].color_hex = "#80429b"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].color_hex = "#40944e"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].first_name = "Ed"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].last_name = "Clark"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].color_hex = "#b8b14e"; opName = "Newt Gingrich"; HistHexcolour = ["#2a5c9c", "#813227", "#b8b14e", "#40944e"]; HistName = [ " Michael Dukakis", " Newt Gingrich", " Ed Clark", " Sonia Johnson/Others", ]; HistEV = [298, 241, 0, 0]; HistPV = ["52,712,145", "50,513,860", "1,396,970", "1,106,352"]; HistPVP = ["49.9%", "47.8%", "1.3%", "1.0%"]; campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[22] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17290, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "And there he goes. The bomb-thrower from Georgia, the Speaker of the House, the man who has devoted the last two years of his life to making the last two of yours hell, stands behind the rostrum in San Diego, accepting the Republican nomination for President of the United States. Every once in a while, running mate Tommy Thompson waltzes into the spotlight with a smile and a friendly wave, but it never takes long for the Republican solar system to reorient itself around Planet Newt. What’s your plan to consign this man to the dustbin of history?", "likelihood": 1 } } if (firedSasso == false && orbit < 1) { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[26] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17942, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "If there’s one person happy with Newt’s nomination, it’s John Sasso, who has dedicated the past several months to a master file of Gingrich opposition research, compiled since his ascension to the Speakership. Some of it is known information, like his ongoing ethics investigation, other pieces aren’t. His affairs, his financial dealings, his backroom attempts to coup past Speakers, all laid out bare for you to see. As Sasso lays document after document onto the table, you realize you could blow him out of the water if none of it were ever traced to the White House.", "likelihood": 1 } } } else { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[26] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17926, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "You and Gingrich, Gingrich and you, continuing your daily partisan battle from the halls of Congress all the way to the White House, the primary contest but a short intermission. Gingrich has made explicit overtures to the THRO movement, labeling you the “Hypocritical Rascal-in-Chief” and promising to file articles of impeachment the day after the election should you, by some miracle, beat him in the Electoral College. How will you respond?", "likelihood": 1 } } } campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[27] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 18320, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "You stroll to the podium and shake hands with the swamp creature. A swaggering Gingrich is holding back bile, keeping to his Contract with America, “positive ideas.” You can’t tell if he is certain of his own victory, or just waiting for you to take the first shot. Whatever the case, he’s giving you the initiative. Fire, or let this swamp creature walk all over you one last time.", "likelihood": 1 } } } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 21 && rummy >= 1) { // Donald Rumsfeld campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].first_name = "Donald"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].last_name = "Rumsfeld"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].first_name = "Monica"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].last_name = "Moorehead/Others"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].color_hex = "#993740"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[1]["fields"].color_hex = "#6973AA"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].color_hex = "#80429b"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].color_hex = "#b18543"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].first_name = "Irwin"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].last_name = "Schiff"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].color_hex = "#817d44"; opName = "Donald Rumsfeld"; HistHexcolour = ["#993740", "#6973AA", "#817d44", "#b18543"]; HistName = [ " Donald Rumsfeld", " Michael Dukakis", " Irwin Schiff", " Monica Moorehead/Others", ]; HistEV = [329, 209, 0, 0]; HistPV = ["53,459,245", "50,164,911", "1,249,277", "926,296"]; HistPVP = ["50.5%", "47.4%", "1.2%", "0.9%"]; campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[22] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17365, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "They are tired of running. Donald Rumsfeld arises from the primaries prepared for the illustrious conquest of America's premier inept coward, you. Accepting the Republican nomination in San Diego, he speaks of a world where demons and bandits roam, free to pillage and kill whatever and however they please. This world, he says, is your world. Joined by Lamar Alexander, they stand as a two-headed beast; one to restore America's status as a military power, the other to restore its heart. How will you open the battle against the technocratic warlord and his pied piper?", "likelihood": 1 } } campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[26] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17955, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "It’s a painful comparison you see every night on TV. Rumsfeld is marching from network to network, boardroom to boardroom, and rally to rally, claiming that Neville Chamberlain has been reincarnated. In fact, he won the presidency in 1988. Rummy is running wild with the analogy that you are Chamberlain, who in a naïve and deadly move, surrendered Kuwait to Saddam like he did to the Czechs and the Sudetenland. The comparison is outlandish to some, but frightening to others. How will you respond to the charges of defeatism?", "likelihood": 1 } } campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[27] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 18307, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "The culmination of months of campaigning arrives on this stage, standing across from Don Rumsfeld. The stage lights beam down upon you both like lights from Heaven, signaling an imminent victory or the release of defeat; depending on how you feel after tonight. The questions are generic, but before long the topic turns to foreign policy. The expectation of the question does not numb the sting. This is the turning point of your campaign, for better or for worse. The question is simple: What will you do to continue to project American strength in the world?", "likelihood": 1 } } } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 21 && getTotalScore() < 3.6 && govern >= 1) { // Bob Dole campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].first_name = "Bob"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].last_name = "Dole"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].first_name = "Lenora"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].last_name = "Fulani/Others"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].color_hex = "#c53131"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[1]["fields"].color_hex = "#676ed3"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].color_hex = "#549b42"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].color_hex = "#b18543"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].first_name = "John"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].last_name = "DeCamp"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].color_hex = "#ddd44e"; HistHexcolour = ["#c53131", "#676ed3", "#ddd44e", "#b18543"]; HistName = [ " Bob Dole", " Michael Dukakis", " John DeCamp", " Lenora Fulani", ]; HistEV = [426, 112, 0, 0]; HistPV = ["55,373,453", "46,914,202", "1,447,204", "1,102,873"]; HistPVP = ["52.8%", "44.7%", "1.4%", "1.1%"]; opName = "Bob Dole"; campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[22] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 16850, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Half a league, half a league, half a league onward. Senator Bob Dole takes the stage at the Republican convention in San Diego, flanked by Elizabeth Dole and running mate Carroll Campbell. His speech is flat, dour, and uninspiring, a broadside on the little you have managed to accomplish over the past four years. With everything on the line, how will you hit back?", "likelihood": 1 } } campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[26] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17720, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Getting back to the campaign, you and Dole have begun to trade blows daily. Dole is making a point of highlighting the rising crime rates in the wake of the disastrous Los Angeles riots, particularly your emplacement of a moratorium on the federal death penalty. How will your campaign approach the issue of crime?", "likelihood": 1 } } campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[27] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 18031, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "You’re backstage before the debate. O’Donnell and Edley are peppering you with bullet points to recite onstage verbatim, Nick Mitropoulous is reminding you about all of Dole’s ticks and habits, and Kitty is trying to push through them all to give you a good luck kiss. You feel strangely detached from the whirlwind around you. How are you going to take him on?", "likelihood": 1 } } } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 21 && getTotalScore() < 3.6 && govern < 1) { // Pat Buchanan campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].first_name = "Pat"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].last_name = "Buchanan"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].first_name = "John"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].last_name = "Hagelin/Others"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].color_hex = "#a05744"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[1]["fields"].color_hex = "#425c63"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].color_hex = "#613359"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].color_hex = "#bebc13"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].first_name = "Oliver"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].last_name = "North"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].color_hex = "#747043"; HistHexcolour = ["#425c63", "#a05744", "#747043", "#bebc13"]; HistName = [ " Michael Dukakis", " Pat Buchanan", " Oliver North", " John Hagelin/Others", ]; HistEV = [351, 187, 0, 0]; HistPV = ["51,891,379", "48,301,475", "3,412,384", "925,126"]; HistPVP = ["49.6%", "46.2%", "3.3%", "0.9%"]; opName = "Pat Buchanan"; campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[22] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 16926, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "You never thought they’d go this far. The extremist, the Holocaust denier, the man who spent all of ‘91 campaigning for David Duke after the Senate expelled him, is accepting the Republican nomination for President of the United States. Paired with running mate Trent Lott, the two are convinced they can beat you without moderating an inch. You’re determined to prove them wrong.", "likelihood": 1 } } if (firedSasso == false && orbit < 1) { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[26] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17770, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "As you and your inner circle meticulously engineer your reelection, John Sasso has been putting his accrued power to good use over the past few months, establishing contact with Republican insiders who brushed elbows with Pat Buchanan during the Reagan administration. Perhaps most damning is an account of Pat Buchanan in 1986, urging President Reagan to visit a Waffen-SS military cemetery in Europe, maintaining that it could not appear that Reagan was “subjected to Jewish pressure.” What will you do with this information?", "likelihood": 1 } } } else { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[26] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17738, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Let’s get back to the campaign. Recently, Pat Buchanan seems to have found his wedge issue of choice to wield against you: Immigration. “Dukakis spells it out in plain sight,” he shouts on factory floors across the Midwest. “Have you seen the lyrics to his campaign theme song? It says, and I quote, ‘on the boats and on the planes, they’re coming to America.’ And when they get here, they take your jobs and lower your wages.” Your response?", "likelihood": 1 } } } campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[27] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 18016, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "You’re on the debate stage with Pat Buchanan. He’s rattling off statistics about the state of the economy, recounting your legislative failures, and trying to keep the focus of the debate on anything other than the chinks in his own armor. You need to keep on the attack.", "likelihood": 1 } } } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 21 && getTotalScore() < 5.6 && govern >= 1) { // Jack Kemp campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].first_name = "Jack"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].last_name = "Kemp"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].first_name = "Ronald"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].last_name = "Daniels/Others"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].color_hex = "#9B4F62"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[1]["fields"].color_hex = "#59677c"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].color_hex = "#a0ad65"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].color_hex = "#648867"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].first_name = "Andre"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].last_name = "Marrou"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].color_hex = "#b8b14e"; opName = "Jack Kemp"; HistHexcolour = ["#9B4F62", "#59677c", "#b8b14e", "#648867"]; HistName = [ " Jack Kemp", " Michael Dukakis", " Andre Marrou", " Ronald Daniels/Others", ]; HistEV = [294, 244, 0, 0]; HistPV = ["51,224,580", "51,149,195", "1,419,873", "911,405"]; HistPVP = ["49.2%", "48.2%", "1.6%", "0.9%"]; campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[22] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17014, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Taking no chances, the Republicans’ nominating convention in San Diego has coronated Jack Kemp, the sunny supply-sider from New York, as their standard-bearer in this election. Combined with the maverick war hero from Arizona, John McCain, the two are touring the country, cracking football jokes and promising the largest tax cut in history. What’s your plan to take them on?", "likelihood": 1 } } campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[26] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17782, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Getting back to the fall campaign, could there be trouble in paradise for the Kemp/McCain ticket? Last night, the senator from Arizona used what appeared to be a racist remark when talking about his captors in Vietnam, claiming that the term only applied to his captors and that he will hate them for the rest of his life. Kemp has disavowed the comments entirely, and outrage has arisen from the Vietnamese-American community. With internal polling showing that the GOP’s long-running domination of the Asian-American vote in danger of slipping, how will you seize on this?", "likelihood": 1 } } campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[27] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 18087, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "You stop at the podium. You’re restless, tired and nervous from the past month of constant campaigning and debate prep, but on the surface you look calm and ready. Across from you is Kemp, smiling and waving, pointing to someone in the audience. Your expression is dour and serious. You’ve got one shot. How will you take on the congressman from New York?", "likelihood": 1 } } } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 21 && getTotalScore() < 5.6 && govern < 1) { // Pat Robertson campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].first_name = "Pat"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].last_name = "Robertson"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].first_name = "James"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].last_name = "Warren/Others"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].color_hex = "#683737"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[1]["fields"].color_hex = "#59769b"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].color_hex = "#d4c04b"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].color_hex = "#b18543"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].first_name = "Ron"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].last_name = "Paul"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].color_hex = "#d4c04b"; opName = "Pat Robertson"; HistHexcolour = ["#683737", "#59769b", "#d4c04b", "#b18543"]; HistName = [ " Pat Robertson", " Michael Dukakis", " Ron Paul", " James Warren/Others", ]; HistEV = [303, 235, 0, 0]; HistPV = ["51,819,645", "51,149,195", "1,419,873", "1,041,795"]; HistPVP = ["49.2%", "48.5%", "1.3%", "1.0%"]; campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[22] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17116, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Second time being the charm, Pat Robertson has accepted the Republican nomination in San Diego, hometown boy Pete Wilson nominated as his running mate. Using a Bible as a prop during his acceptance speech, he asks if you’ve forgotten a few key passages. His message is part sermon, part brazen conspiracy theorizing about the “one-world government” you are pushing on America. The whole show is ridiculous and insulting, and you turn off the television halfway through. You’re convinced that this country is losing its mind.", "likelihood": 1 } } if (firedSasso == false && orbit < 1) { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[26] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17821, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "As you and your inner circle meticulously engineer your reelection, John Sasso has been leveraging his influence to assemble a team tasked with looking into Pat Robertson’s charities. What he has found is nothing short of staggering. Pat Robertson using CBN facilities and mailing lists to promote his campaign. Pat Robertson using his “humanitarian aid flights” to transport diamond mining equipment for his business ventures in Zaire. Pat Robertson using his African timber investments to make deals with warlords. The extent of his corruption is astonishing, so much bigger than you ever thought.", "likelihood": 1 } } } else { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[26] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17801, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Let’s get back to the campaign. Convinced that overt religious appeals are the key to victory, Pat Robertson has adopted a fire-and-brimstone cadence, suggesting that you’re not a real Christian since the Bible you swore in on during your inauguration was Orthodox, instead of Catholic or Protestant. He has even claimed that Christians across America have been “tricked” into “falling victim” to your socially liberal agenda. How do you want to handle the religion issue on the campaign?", "likelihood": 1 } } } campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[27] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 18176, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "You’re standing in the elevator, alone with your thoughts as you’re lifted up to the debate floor. It’s nice to have a moment of peace after all the manic prep sessions, surrounded by Chris, Kirk, and Nick, shoving facts and figures down your throat. When the elevator reaches the third floor, what will you say to Pat Robertson?", "likelihood": 1 } } } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 21 && getTotalScore() >= 5.6 && govern >= 1) { // Phil Gramm campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].first_name = "Phil"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].last_name = "Gramm"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].first_name = "Barbara"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].last_name = "Ehrenreich/Others"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].color_hex = "#683225"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[1]["fields"].color_hex = "#2e48bb"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].color_hex = "#772569"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].color_hex = "#70a378"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].first_name = "Bo"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].last_name = "Gritz"; opName = "Phil Gramm"; HistHexcolour = ["#2e48bb", "#683225", "#772569", "#70a378"]; HistName = [ " Michael Dukakis", " Phil Gramm", " Bo Gritz", " Barbara Ehrenreich/Others", ]; HistEV = [346, 192, 0, 0]; HistPV = ["54,189,129", "48,721,240", " 1,180,123", "956,068"]; HistPVP = ["51.6%", "46.4%", "1.1%", "0.9%"]; campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[22] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17172, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "As Phil Gramm accepts the Republican nomination at San Diego, it’s hard not to wonder how a politician even more boring than yourself won the nomination of a major party. He drones on about deficits and interest rates, accusing you of sacrificing long-term economic security for short-term gain. His running mate, a young senator from Oklahoma named Don Nickles, is a little more lively, but still nothing to write home about. How will you approach running against the Gramm/Nickles ticket?", "likelihood": 1 } } if (firedSasso == false && orbit < 1) { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[26] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17853, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Over the past several months, John Sasso has all but vanished from your inner circle, leading a small task force conducting research into Phil Gramm’s days in business. One evening, he marches back to the Oval Office with a black binder. Inside are records detailing activities from Senator Phil Gramm dating back to the 1970s. Listed in explicit detail are his financial investments in pornographic films, originating with a 1974 film called “Truck Stop Women.” What is your reaction?", "likelihood": 1 } } } else { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[26] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17832, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "As you take a lax “Rose Garden” campaign schedule, Phil Gramm has rejuvenated his campaign, traveling through the country like a man on a mission. He seems to have made the federal budget his priority, calling loudly for reducing waste and slashing taxes. His most recent antic is what he calls “the Dickey Flatt test,” asking if any tax increase is worth taking out of the pocket of small business owners like Dickey Flatt, a print shop owner in Mexia, Texas. What do you think of this?", "likelihood": 1 } } } campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[27] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 18237, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Phil Gramm’s hand feels weird. That’s all you can think as you walk back to your podium, hoping nobody notices as you wipe your hand on your suit jacket. Truthfully, you’re bored here, but you’ve got to get this out of the way before getting back to the campaign trail. What tone will you take debating Gramm?", "likelihood": 1 } } } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 21 && getTotalScore() > 5.6 && govern < 1) { // Bob Dornan campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].first_name = "Bob"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].last_name = "Dornan"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].first_name = "Ralph"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].last_name = "Nader/Others"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].color_hex = "#9C6666"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[1]["fields"].color_hex = "#415685"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].color_hex = "#7e4f70"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[3]["fields"].color_hex = "#5e8f5c"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].first_name = "John"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].last_name = "Silber"; campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[2]["fields"].color_hex = "#aa9c76"; opName = "Bob Dornan"; HistHexcolour = ["#415685", "#9C6666", "#aa9c76", "#5e8f5c"]; HistName = [ " Michael Dukakis", " Bob Dornan", " John Silber", " Ralph Nader/Others", ]; HistEV = [407, 131, 0, 0]; HistPV = [" 55,419,809", " 46,925,129", " 1,379,578", " 1,023,017"]; HistPVP = ["52.9%", "44.8%", "1.3%", "1.0%"]; campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[22] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17232, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "As Bob Dornan accepts the Republican nomination at San Diego, your advisors are ecstatic. He’s a certified lunatic, on the fringe of every issue, repellent to anyone and everyone outside his own base, shouting from the top of his lungs about conspiracy theories. You shoo them away, frustrated and disappointed that your wish for a high-minded civil debate has been denied like this. At least his running mate, Pete Domenici, is a serious thinker. What’s your plan to dispatch these poor souls?", "likelihood": 1 } } if (firedSasso == false && orbit < 1) { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[26] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17916, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "As you exit a meeting with the Joint Chiefs of Staff, you’re accosted in the hallway by Sasso, who asks for a moment of your time. You take him into an empty conference room, where he produces a manila folder full of documents and tells you a story. In 1978, 46-year-old Senator Pete Domenici entered an extramarital affair with 24-year-old Michelle Laxalt, daughter of his Senate colleague Paul Laxalt, resulting in the birth of a secret child. You feel dirty just knowing about it.", "likelihood": 1 } } } else { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[26] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17862, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Owing to your opponent being Bob Dornan, you’ve adhered so far to a confident campaign schedule, only venturing beyond the Beltway for sporadic visits to the most important of swing states. Meanwhile, Dornan has been barnstorming the Upper South and Appalachia, wielding abortion and “traditional values” as his wedge issues of choice. Your campaign internals tell you the fundamentals are strong, but Chris Edley is starting to worry that, should you not counter more effectively, he might be able to steal some of these votes from right under your nose. Do you believe him?", "likelihood": 1 } } } campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[27] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 18294, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "You step towards the podium as if you were Plato coming down from the mount, preparing to school a rabble-rouser in the streets of Athens. And perhaps you are, for beside you is Bob Dornan. You flash a weary smile at the crowd, your exhaustion eased by the success you’ve had over the past four years. You turn to the man beside you, staring him down.", "likelihood": 1 } } } // Q24, DNC if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 22 && angryBase >= 2 && victories < 2) { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[23] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17501, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "After some close calls in the early primaries, you’ve consolidated support from terrified Democrats to deny Jackson and his band of mutineers control of the Bounty once more. As you take the stage, the party before you is bitterly divided, disillusioned with your leadership, and doubtful that you can win the November election. What will you say to inspire them to fall in line with you one more time?", "likelihood": 1 } } } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 22 && angryBase >= 2 && victories >= 2) { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[23] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17462, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "After a close call in Iowa, you’ve dispatched Jesse Jackson and his band of mutineers with relative ease and retained the Bounty. Even so, intra-party wounds persist, despite a strong investment overall in the same political project as you. As you take the stage in Baltimore, Maryland to accept the Democratic nomination for the final time, what will you say to the convention hall?", "likelihood": 1 } } } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 22 && victories < 2) { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[23] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17480, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "In those days, in those distant days, you promised that the best America was yet to come. Here you stand, four years later, and the best America seems further away than ever. Inside the convention hall, the atmosphere is bleak and dour. Outside the convention hall, protests swamp the muggy streets of Baltimore, shouting slogans about Ruby Ridge and FEMA concentration camps. It’s all so tiring.", "likelihood": 1 } } } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 22 && victories < 6) { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[23] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17487, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Protestors swamp the streets outside the Democratic National Convention in Baltimore, Maryland. They wave signs saying “Say No to the NWO,” “Free Randy Weaver,” and “DUKE: The Butcher of Los Angeles.” Standing at center stage is you, the Commander in Chief, marshaling your party in defense of an increasingly untenable political middle. As you take the stage one last time, what do you have to say for yourself?", "likelihood": 1 } } } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 22 && victories >= 6) { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[23] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17494, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Protestors swamp the streets outside the Democratic National Convention in Baltimore, Maryland. They wave signs saying “Say No to the NWO,” “Free Randy Weaver,” and “DUKE: The Butcher of Los Angeles.” Standing at center stage is you, the Commander in Chief, marshaling your party in defense of an increasingly untenable political middle. As you take the stage one last time, what do you have to say for yourself?", "likelihood": 1 } } } // Q25, VP if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 18 && vp == "lloyd") { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[24] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17632, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "What to do with Lloyd Bentsen? Although the Democratic bigwigs welcome his return to ensure an open field in ‘96, you’ve got to get over the finish line here first, and the 71-year-old Vice President hardly brings any new bloc of voters into the fold this time.", "likelihood": 1 } } const customStyling = document.createElement("style"); customStyling.innerHTML = `#campaign_sign { background-image: url("https://itsastronomical.com/assets/1992Duke/imgur/PlnZqNP.png"); }`; document.head.appendChild(customStyling); } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 18 && vp == "gore") { campaignTrail_temp.running_mate_image_url = "https://itsastronomical.com/assets/1992Duke/imgur/NZqmyNO.png"; campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[24] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17649, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Al Gore is, for all intents and purposes, a second you. Robotic, intellectual, and deeply technocratic, you’re starting to think that the only difference behind his rallies and yours are the presence of Confederate flags. Ever since the Dukakis/Gore ticket received the party blessing at the DNC, you’ve been itching to slot him into the campaign. But how?", "likelihood": 1 } } const customStyling = document.createElement("style"); customStyling.innerHTML = `#campaign_sign { background-image: url("https://itsastronomical.com/assets/1992Duke/imgur/ogrLeej.png"); }`; document.head.appendChild(customStyling); } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 18 && vp == "mikulski") { campaignTrail_temp.running_mate_image_url = "https://itsastronomical.com/assets/1992Duke/imgur/Ua6aqmU.png"; campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[24] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17680, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Barbara Mikulski is a good running mate – maybe a little too good. Since announcing her addition to the ticket, she has received an outpouring of support from women, ethnic whites, and labor, and her strong personality threatens to outshine you. With some worrying campaign data about the prospect of a female Vice President, you’ll have to decide how you want to handle her now that the general election is under way.", "likelihood": 1 } } const customStyling = document.createElement("style"); customStyling.innerHTML = `#campaign_sign { background-image: url("https://itsastronomical.com/assets/1992Duke/imgur/gJ6OuMi.png"); }`; document.head.appendChild(customStyling); } // Q29, Jobs Report if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 27 && (econ + fedPoint + saudiVisit + healthPoint >= 2)) { econ += 1; campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[28] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17972, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Your campaign has been enlivened by news that this month’s jobs report has easily surpassed expectations, confirmation of your campaign’s narrative of an expanding economy. Unemployment has dropped 0.4 percentage points with a stable labor force participation rate, including a solid rebound in manufacturing jobs and upward revisions of past months. How will your campaign take advantage of this?", "likelihood": 1 } } } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 27 && (econ + fedPoint + saudiVisit + healthPoint >= 0)) { econ += 1; campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[28] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17980, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Your campaign has been enlivened by news that this month’s jobs report has easily surpassed expectations, confirmation of your campaign’s narrative of an expanding economy. How will your campaign take advantage of this?", "likelihood": 1 } } } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 27 && (econ + fedPoint + saudiVisit + healthPoint >= -2)) { campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[28] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17990, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Your campaign has received disappointing news this morning with the release of an underwhelming September jobs report. Unemployment has decreased by a statistically insignificant one-tenth of a percentage point, and the Dow Jones has sunk 54 points in response to the news. It’s not apocalyptic, but the country just isn’t receiving the economic tailwinds you’d hoped it would. How should your campaign handle this?", "likelihood": 1 } } } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 27) { econ -= 1; campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[28] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17998, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "Your campaign has received disappointing news this morning with the release of a dismal September jobs report. Unemployment has remained steady at 6.7 percent and the United States is still hemorrhaging manufacturing jobs, although the labor force is still stable. Nonetheless, the Dow Jones has sunk 78 points in response to the news, and it’s clear the economy isn’t hitting the numbers it needs to recover quickly. How should your campaign handle this?", "likelihood": 1 } } } // Q30 if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 28 && theyHatedYouForSpeakingTheTruth == true) { // Buchanan does lowkirkuenly vile shit campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[29] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17706, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "You don’t get to have nice things. Fresh off of spreading the asinine rumor that you took medication for depression and anxiety after the Republicans swept Congress, Buchanan has begun to hint at a far more disturbing theory. It’s hard to piece together the whole thing, but it involves a medical decision made by your family on behalf of your comatose brother Stelian after a hit-and-run accident in 1973, a time before euthanasia or “death with dignity.” You don’t even know how anyone got wind of this, let alone Buchanan or the radical right. Election Day is in one week. You have to respond to this.", "likelihood": 1 } } } else if (campaignTrail_temp.question_number == 28 && campaignTrail_temp.candidate_json[0]["fields"].last_name == "Robertson" && heavensGate == true && bibleQuote == true && assaultBan == true) { // campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[29] = { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 17700, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "It is Election Day. return (score <= 3.5 && govern < 1) ? 0.25 : 999; } }, { id: "kemp", name: "Jack Kemp", front: "https://itsastronomical.com/assets/1992Duke/imgur/LkkEvYe.png", back: "https://itsastronomical.com/assets/1992Duke/imgur/H8b50EB.png", distance: () => { const score = getTotalScore(); return (score >= 3.6 && score <= 5.5 && govern >= 1) ? 0.25 : 999; } }, { id: "robertson", name: "Pat Robertson", front: "https://itsastronomical.com/assets/1992Duke/imgur/Jax7yHO.png", back: "https://itsastronomical.com/assets/1992Duke/imgur/7TZYY9b.png", distance: () => { const score = getTotalScore(); return (score >= 3.6 && score <= 5.5 && govern < 1) ? 0.25 : 999; } }, { id: "gramm", name: "Phil Gramm", front: "https://itsastronomical.com/assets/1992Duke/imgur/fSwS6P0.png", back: "https://itsastronomical.com/assets/1992Duke/imgur/4RqJsyn.png", distance: () => { const score = getTotalScore(); return (score >= 5.6 && govern >= 1) ? 0.25 : 999; } }, { id: "dornan", name: "Bob Dornan", front: "https://itsastronomical.com/assets/1992Duke/imgur/nCB2Vac.png", back: "https://itsastronomical.com/assets/1992Duke/imgur/NydWQDe.png", distance: () => { const score = getTotalScore(); return (score >= 5.6 && govern < 1) ? 0.25 : 999; } }, { id: "king", name: "Edward King", front: "https://itsastronomical.com/assets/1992Duke/imgur/TEAXWbZ.png", back: "https://itsastronomical.com/assets/1992Duke/imgur/Goy7nLC.png", distance: () => { if (king !== 5) return 999; return 0.1; } }, { id: "newt", name: "Newt Gingrich", front: "https://itsastronomical.com/assets/1992Duke/imgur/B6Kq64X.png", back: "https://itsastronomical.com/assets/1992Duke/imgur/i6UPmKa.png", distance: () => { if (newt !== 2) return 999; return 0.11; } }, { id: "rummy", name: "Donald Rumsfeld", front: "https://itsastronomical.com/assets/1992Duke/imgur/v3Twm8d.png", back: "https://itsastronomical.com/assets/1992Duke/imgur/AAzh89G.png", distance: () => { if (rummy !== 1) return 999; return 0.12; } } ]; function getOpponentDeck() { const q = campaignTrail_temp?.question_number ?? 0; let gop = []; // king if (king >= 5) { const c = opponents.find(o => o.id === "king"); if (c) gop = [c]; } // newt else if (newt >= 2) { const c = opponents.find(o => o.id === "newt"); if (c) gop = [c]; } // rummy else if (rummy === 1) { const c = opponents.find(o => o.id === "rummy"); if (c) gop = [c]; } // normal stuff for the GOP, trims slowly towards the end else { gop = opponents.filter(o => o.id === "dole" || o.id === "buchanan" || o.id === "kemp" || o.id === "robertson" || o.id === "gramm" || o.id === "dornan" ); gop = gop .map(o => ({ ...o, dist: Number(o.distance()) })) .filter(o => !isNaN(o.dist)); gop.sort((a, b) => a.dist - b.dist); if (q >= 20) gop = gop.slice(0, 1); else if (q >= 19) gop = gop.slice(0, 2); else if (q >= 18) gop = gop.slice(0, 4); gop = gop.map(({ dist, ...rest }) => rest); } return gop; } function renderOpponentCards() { const popOutMenu = document.getElementById("popOutMenu"); if (!popOutMenu) return; let cardSystem = document.getElementById("cardSystem"); if (!cardSystem) { cardSystem = document.createElement("div"); cardSystem.id = "cardSystem"; popOutMenu.appendChild(cardSystem); } let left = document.getElementById("cardDeck"); let right = document.getElementById("cardDetail"); if (!left || !right) { cardSystem.innerHTML = ""; left = document.createElement("div"); left.id = "cardDeck"; right = document.createElement("div"); right.id = "cardDetail"; cardSystem.appendChild(left); cardSystem.appendChild(right); } const state = (window.opponentCardState = window.opponentCardState || { flipped: [] }); const active = getOpponentDeck(); const byId = new Map(active.map(c => [c.id, c])); state.flipped = state.flipped.filter(id => byId.has(id)); const rightCards = state.flipped.map(id => byId.get(id)).filter(Boolean); const leftCards = active.filter(c => !state.flipped.includes(c.id)); function flipToRight(id) { if (!byId.has(id)) return; if (!state.flipped.includes(id)) state.flipped.unshift(id); renderOpponentCards(); } function flipToLeft(id) { state.flipped = state.flipped.filter(x => x !== id); renderOpponentCards(); } function renderPile(pileEl, cards, side) { pileEl.innerHTML = ""; pileEl.classList.add("card-pile"); pileEl.setAttribute("data-side", side); const maxPeek = 8; // top 2 readable, a couple peeking behind const shown = cards.slice(0, maxPeek); if (shown.length === 0) { const msg = document.createElement("div"); msg.className = "card-placeholder"; msg.innerHTML = side === "right" ? "

The Opposition

Here, you may view a deck full of your possible Republican opponents. As the game goes on, the deck will incrementally shrink until the Republicans have nominated a candidate.

Click on either side of a card to flip it." : ""; pileEl.appendChild(msg); return; } // Render back-to-front so index 0 ends up on top for (let i = shown.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) { const card = shown[i]; const img = document.createElement("img"); img.src = side === "left" ? card.front : card.back; img.alt = card.name; img.title = card.name; if (side === "left") { // existing left fan (diagonal) const offset = i * 10; img.style.left = "0px"; img.style.top = `${offset}px`; img.style.zIndex = String(100 - i); img.style.opacity = "1"; } else { const vOffset = i * 18; // vertical stack spacing img.style.left = "0px"; img.style.top = `${vOffset}px`; img.style.zIndex = String(100 - i); img.style.opacity = "1"; } img.onclick = () => { if (side === "left") flipToRight(card.id); else flipToLeft(card.id); }; pileEl.appendChild(img); } } renderPile(left, leftCards, "left"); renderPile(right, rightCards, "right"); } function mobileOpponentCards() { const hqDiv = document.getElementById("headquarter"); if (!hqDiv) return; let cardSystem = document.getElementById("cardSystem"); if (!cardSystem) { cardSystem = document.createElement("div"); cardSystem.id = "cardSystem"; hqDiv.appendChild(cardSystem); } let left = document.getElementById("cardDeck"); let right = document.getElementById("cardDetail"); if (!left || !right) { cardSystem.innerHTML = ""; left = document.createElement("div"); left.id = "cardDeck"; right = document.createElement("div"); right.id = "cardDetail"; cardSystem.appendChild(left); cardSystem.appendChild(right); } const state = (window.opponentCardState = window.opponentCardState || { flipped: [] }); const active = getOpponentDeck(); const byId = new Map(active.map(c => [c.id, c])); state.flipped = state.flipped.filter(id => byId.has(id)); const rightCards = state.flipped.map(id => byId.get(id)).filter(Boolean); const leftCards = active.filter(c => !state.flipped.includes(c.id)); function flipToRight(id) { if (!byId.has(id)) return; if (!state.flipped.includes(id)) state.flipped.unshift(id); mobileOpponentCards(); } function flipToLeft(id) { state.flipped = state.flipped.filter(x => x !== id); mobileOpponentCards(); } function renderPile(pileEl, cards, side) { pileEl.innerHTML = ""; pileEl.classList.add("card-pile"); pileEl.setAttribute("data-side", side); const maxPeek = 8; // top 2 readable, a couple peeking behind const shown = cards.slice(0, maxPeek); if (shown.length === 0) { const msg = document.createElement("div"); msg.className = "card-placeholder"; msg.style.color = "#000000" msg.innerHTML = side === "right" ? "

The Opposition

Here, you may view a deck full of your possible Republican opponents. As the game goes on, the deck will incrementally shrink until the Republicans have nominated a candidate.

Click on either side of a card to flip it." : ""; pileEl.appendChild(msg); return; } // Render back-to-front so index 0 ends up on top for (let i = shown.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) { const card = shown[i]; const img = document.createElement("img"); img.src = side === "left" ? card.front : card.back; img.alt = card.name; img.title = card.name; if (side === "left") { // existing left fan (diagonal) const offset = i * 10; img.style.left = "0px"; img.style.top = `${offset}px`; img.style.zIndex = String(100 - i); img.style.opacity = "1"; } else { const hOffset = i * 8; // horizontal offset (left to right) img.style.left = `${hOffset}px`; img.style.top = `1px`; img.style.zIndex = String(100 - i); img.style.opacity = "1"; } img.onclick = () => { if (side === "left") flipToRight(card.id); else flipToLeft(card.id); }; pileEl.appendChild(img); } } renderPile(left, leftCards, "left"); renderPile(right, rightCards, "right"); } // All the stuff for the variable tracker let savedX = null; let savedY = null; if (!document.getElementById("system-title-css")) { const style = document.createElement("style"); style.id = "system-title-css"; style.textContent = ` #cardDeck img, #cardDetail img { box-shadow: 0 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.75), 0 7px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 0 11px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.2); } .window-pane { overflow-y: auto; } #cardSystem { display: flex; gap: 14px; align-items: flex-start; height: auto; max-height: calc(100% - 80px); overflow: visible; } .card-pile { position: relative; overflow: visible; } #cardDeck.card-pile { width: 230px; height: 300px; } #cardDetail.card-pile { width: 230px; height: 300px; } #cardDeck.card-pile img, #cardDetail.card-pile img { position: absolute; width: 200px; max-width: 200px; max-height: 280px; height: auto; object-fit: contain; image-rendering: auto; /* better text readability on backs */ cursor: pointer; } .card-placeholder { font-family: ChicagoFLF, Geneva, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-color: black; line-height: 14px; padding: 6px; } @font-face { font-family: 'ChicagoFLF'; src: url("data:application/octet-stream;base64,AAEAAAAPAIAAAwBwRkZUTVmd7iAAAMUMAAAAHE9TLzI0LfwUAAABeAAAAGBjbWFwH+rdPAAADCAAABI2Y3Z0IAjWAV4AAB+AAAAAGGZwZ235x80cAAAeWAAAAOlnYXNw//8AAwAAxQQAAAAIZ2x5Zlwmp9sAACTAAACIvGhlYWQFEcEyAAAA/AAAADZoaGVhCuIIwwAAATQAAAAkaG10eM5YzXUAAAHYAAAKSGxvY2HUJvYyAAAfmAAABShtYXhwBT8ChAAAAVgAAAAgbmFtZWDp5MQAAK18AAAFNHBvc3QAzq8yAACysAAAElJwcmVwFwmwhwAAH0QAAAA7AAEAAAACGZpDsByNXw889QALA+gAAAAAz6Ox0QAAAADPo7HR/9X/NQbVA9wAAAAIAAIAAAAAAAAAAQAAA9z/OABZByn/1f/QBtUAAQAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAApEAAQAAApMBQABQAUAAUAACAAAAAAAIAAACAAAAAAMAAgAEAqgB9AAFAAAAzADMAAABHgDMAMwAAAEeAGYCAAgCAgEGAwIAAAIABIAAAAMAAAAAAAAAAAAAAABDRyAgAMAAIP//A9z/OABZA9wAyyAAAAkAAAAAAkcC7gAAACAAAQH0AAAAAAAAAU0AAAFAAAAB9ACnAkcApwLtAEwCRwBUA0kAVANLAFQA+gBUAaIAVAGiAFQCaABFAkgAVAFNAFQCRwBUAU0AVAJJAFQCmwBUApsApwKbAFQCmgBQApsAVAKbAFQCmwBUApsAVAKZAFQCmwBUAU0AVAFNAFQB9AA6ApsAVAH0ADoCmQBUA5QAVAKbAFcCmwBhApsAYwKbAFQCRwBUAkcAVAKbAFQCmwBUAfQApwJHAAAC7gBUAkcAVAPoAFQC7gBUApsAVAKbAFQCmwBUApsAVAJFAFQB9AAAApsAVAKbAFQD6ABUApsAVAKbAFQCowBUAaEAVAKBAFwBoQBUAqYAhAKbAAABzAB7ApsAVAKbAFQCTABUApsAVAKZAFQB9ABUApsAVAKbAFQBTQBUAfcAAAKaAFQBTQBUA+gAVAKbAFQCmwBUApsAVAKbAFQB9ABUAkUAVAHxAFQCmwBUApsAVAPoAFQCmwBUApsAVAKjAFQBoQBUAaEApwGhAFQCnABUAWQAAAH0AK4CRwBUAu4AVAJHAFcDQgBPAaEApwJHAFQCBABXA0kAIgJUAFMDPwAxAkcAVANJACICEABdAfQAUAJHAFQBlQBPAZ8ASAHYAIUDQgBUApsAVAFNAFQBTQBPAUUAYAJUAFQDPwBGAyAAJwMgACcDIAAnApsAXgKbAFcCmwBXApsAVwKbAFcCmwBXApsAVwOUAFQCmwBUAkcAVAJHAFQCRwBUAkcAVAH0AKYB9ACnAfQAeQH0AFsCmwAiAu4AVAKbAFQCmwBUApsAVAKbAFQCmwBUAe4ARQKb/+sCmwBUApsAVAKbAFQCmwBUApsAVAKbAFQC7gBUApsAVAKbAFQCmwBUApsAVAKbAFQCmwBUA+gAUwJMAFQCmQBUApkAVAKZAFQCmQBUAU0AEgFNAFQBTQALAU3//AKbAFQCmwBUApsAVAKbAFQCmwBUApsAVAKbAFQCRwBUApv/8wKbAFQCmwBUApsAVAKbAFQCmwBUApsAVAKbAFQCmwBjAkwAVAKbAGMCTABUApsAYwJMAFQCmwBUAkcAVAKZAFQCmwBUApsAVAKbAFQCmwBUAfQAbgFN/9UBTQBUBDsApwKbAFQCRwAAAfcAAAJHAFQBTQBUAkcAEwFNABMC7gBUApsAVALuAFQCmwBUA5QAVAPoAFQCmwBUAfQAVAKbAFQB9ABCAkUAVAJFAFQCRQBUAkUAVAJFAFQCRQBUAfQAAAKbAFQCmwBUApsAVAKbAFQD6ABUA+gAVAKbAFQCmwBUApsAVAKjAFQCowBUAqMAVAKjAFQB9ABUA+gAVA
